name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Keep 'em going! 🏁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, I hope that you are well and staying safe during this uncertain time for our nation... * | | _You're receiving this email because you're committed to defending America against rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying our values. If you're giving up on this critical fight, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=Nt5LN&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQgbGXV&)_
---
|
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, First, I hope that you are well and staying safe during this uncertain time for our nation. And secondly, thank you. Because of your support, our _Faces of America_ spokespeople have been on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, New Mexico and Pennsylvania since August. It is also thanks to your support that three months ago we were able to expand and launch ads into:
* **_Michigan_** \- One supporting Black Republican SUPERSTAR John James for Senate and another opposing radical Rep. Rashida Tlaib
* **_Minnesota_** \- To defeat America-hating extremist Ilhan Omar

John James has a good chance of defeating tax and spend, pro-abortion Senator Gary Peters and Rush Limbaugh gives John James a big thumbs up...
* * *
| | "John James is what everyone would hope and pray for in a son. He is what everyone would hope for in a son-in-law and what everybody would hope for in a senator. He is a guy who grew up amazingly believing in the American dream and has lived it. He personifies it."
---
\- Rush Limbaugh
* * *
As the nation is focused on the possible financial impact and death toll due to the coronavirus, the Left continues to place blame on President Trump, not only for the outbreak of the virus itself, but for sky-rocketing unemployment and the sputtering economy.
**We all know that the coronavirus is not President Trump's fault. The blame falls solely on China.**
**More than anything, China wants to be number one in the world from an economic and a military standpoint.**
**But President Trump started getting in the way of their goal...**
When President Trump looked at all the trade agreements with China and he said "time out." And much to the chagrin of China loving Liberals in America, President Trump imposed hefty tariffs on many of the goods China imports to the United States.
They retaliated and so did President Trump which caused so much damage to their economy that they agreed to a trade agreement with the US.
But then China declared war on the world...
No shots were fired, but as of right now there is over 250,000 deaths including more than 70,000 in the U.S.
All evidence in investigations of the origin of the deadly coronavirus points to two laboratories in Wuhan, China.
Just as the terrorists did on 9-11 they have managed to shut down our economy and in all probability change the way we live our lives forever.
And they hid the severity of the virus from the entire world.
They locked down all travel from the Wuhan area but allowed infected people to travel all over the world bringing the virus to 184 different countries, sending thousands to the hospital, hundreds of thousands to the morgues, millions into quarantine and shutting down world economies.
**Democrats need to place blame where blame is due, hold China accountable and stop attacking President Trump!**
But that's just not going to happen...
President Trump has been in battle after battle with the Democrats and it has just gotten tougher. Now that Joe Biden is the "chosen one," millions of dollars from the Democratic National Committee, Michael Bloomberg and leftist, radical liberal Fat Cats will be pouring into his campaign.
Unfortunately, polls show Joe Biden with a slight lead over President Trump. And though this poll was conducted before the allegations of sexual harassment/assault by Biden's former staffer Tara Reade, **it's not good news**.
But a recent _Latino Decisions_ poll reveals a weak spot for Joe Biden and that weak spot is with Hispanic Americans. This is a huge concern for Democrats. They know if they lose the Hispanic vote, and more votes from other minorities, Biden will lose.
**We plan to use this new information to our advantage and expand and increase our ads in Hispanic markets.**
And worse than "Sleepy Joe" becoming our next President? His running mate selection.
He already vowed that his running mate would be a woman, and now some of the names floating around for consideration are socialists like Elizabeth Warren and Kamala Harris and Liberals like Stacey Abrams and...
**...HILLARY CLINTON!**
Can you imagine the irreparable damage that Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton (or Elizabeth Warren or Kamala Harris) would inflict on our country?! **And worse, what if Joe Biden can't serve and one of these left-wing radicals becomes President?**
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGjMwD&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Ez5CQ2u&)
We **MUST** fight tooth and nail to make sure that does not happen!
We **MUST** stay on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, New Mexico and Pennsylvania, increase our ads in Hispanic markets and expand into the states where data shows the Democrat is vulnerable.
We **MUST** continue to be laser-focused making sure minorities hear the truth about President Trump and Republicans.
Not only is that important for President Trump to defeat Joe Biden, but if we can defeat 18 Democrats in November, **Republicans will take back the House and Nancy Pelosi will be dethroned as Speaker**!
And we have the plan to do just that...
We've proven that our "Nadler Method" outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years.
"Our efforts to expand the [black] electorate were made more difficult by [their] black radio strategy... Republican messaging to the base will make base voter continuity, not to mention expansion, very difficult for Democrats."

\- Democrat Donna Brazile
Former Chairwoman of the Democratic National Committee
---
"Never-Trumpers" are blaming President Trump for the coronavirus pandemic to make sure that he does not win re-election...
**That's because, before the COVID-19 outbreak, polls showed that instead of losing support, President Trump was gaining support among minorities, Peter!**
**That's why it's imperative that we stay on the air in support of President Trump and to make sure minority voters hear the truth about the lies that the Democrats have been feeding them for decades.**
We must stay on the air and expand into the states where President Trump needs the most help (and can win) and defeat some of the most radical, socialist political incumbents.
We have paid for our radio time through May and now working to raise **$43,800** a month for June, July and August. That is just the bare minimum we need. If we raise more we'll buy more ads.
The battle for America continues, and with you by our side, we will prevail. **All we have to do is syphon off a few percentages of the minority votes from the Democrats and they will lose!**
**WE MUST FIGHT** together on behalf of President Trump's re-election and reverse the Left's march toward Socialism...
**We've come so far in four years, having another four is imperative.**
[Please RENEW your support today by sending a most generous gift of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGjMwD&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Ewb4S72&)
But if that is just too much for you right now, please know that any amount you feel comfortable sending is critically needed.
If you live by a monthly budget, Peter, I've set up the ability for us to process monthly recurring donations which will help greatly in our budgeting as we move forward. All you have to do is check the monthly option on the donation page, enter the amount you wish to donate monthly, and your gift will be processed around the same time every month until after the election.
There's a lot of work to do, but together, we can dispel the Liberals' Lies and take our America back.
[I trust you will do what you can.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGjMwD&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9ddQzY&)
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. Peter, it's an honor to fight alongside you on behalf of our great Country to reverse the Left's march toward Socialism. [Your support keeps us going!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGjMwD&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyCiMu5&)
I'll be sending you more information and updating you regularly on our activities and election news. In the meantime, stay safe. Stay well. Please don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SGjMwD&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EEQchWG&)
---

| Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=Nt5LN&mc=Jk&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EQqzt0z&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=Nt5LN&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Et5gGOR&pt=change_details) at any time.
[ ](https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=ytWvg&u=z93TV&z=EVZlSRj&)
---

Senator Sara Gideon (D-ME)
Senator Mike Espy (D-MS)
Senator Steve Bullock (D-MT)
Senator Cal Cunningham (D-NC)
Senator Jaime Harrison (D-SC)_

[We're laser-focused on making that a reality. We've watched in horror for three-and-a-half years as Trump and his extremist party have torn the country apart. It's past time to put an end to their assault.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: It's Time To Drain The Swamp
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-yk/) May 12, 2020 **READ: Bill's Latest Op-Ed In TN Star** Bill Hagerty released his latest editorial in the TN Star last week calling out the Washington liberals seeking to bail out the reckless spending of local and state governments. Twice now, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer have held American families, workers, and businesses hostage for days by delaying relief funding in the name of securing tens of millions of dollars for the Kennedy Center, pushing her Green New Deal, changing voting laws, and growing government to advance her radical socialist agenda. More recently, there have been calls to give handouts to failing state and local governments, not because of the coronavirus, but because these states have been mismanaged and run irresponsibly. The American taxpayer should not bail out state and local governments for the reckless fiscal decisions made before the coronavirus. Read Bill's latest editorial **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-r/)** **ICYMI: DOJ Dropped Cases Against General Michael Flynn** After years of political harassment, General Michael Flynn, former National Security Advisor, has been exonerated. The criminal cases against General Flynn were dropped by the Department of Justice after an **[internal memo](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-y/) **raised "serious questions about the nature of the investigation." To read Bill's statement on the dropped criminal cases against General Michael Flynn, visit our website **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-j/)** Barack Obama, Joe Beijing Biden and their administration spied on President Donald Trump during their time in office. It's time to drain the swamp. Share this GIF on [**Twitter**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-t/) and [**Facebook**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-i/) if you agree.
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-d/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-h/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-k/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-u/) **Bill Hagerty: China Operates More Like Trade Enemy Than All**[OANN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Pandemic Exposes Reliance On China In U.S. Supply Chain[**Clarksville Online:**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-c/) President Donald Trump 'Kept His Campaign Promise' to Stand Up to China[**Fox Business:**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-q/) China operating more like trade enemy than trade ally: Bill Hagerty, Andy Puzder
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revial. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-e/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-s/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-g/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-w/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-yd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pnijkt-fuutjhhtj-yh/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Economic Dignity
body:
#EconomicDignity- not GDP- must be our North Star. | | | |
---
| **#EconomicDignity- must be our North Star.**
---
| | |
---
| | **[#EconomicDignity](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a041c498ad&e=3f151f8b74)** \- not GDP- must be our North Star. It must ensure the capacity to 1) care for family & be there for its most precious moments; 2) pursue potential & purpose; 3) work free from domination & humiliation.
---
| [DONATE](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=685ff4248d&e=3f151f8b74 "DONATE")
---
| Dear Friend,

Economic dignity means providing people with the capacity to care for a family. It has become clear that the Coronavirus pandemic exposed our nation’s shortcomings, especially when it comes to policies like paid leave, a living wage for frontline workers, and access to healthcare.

Economic dignity “is about more than putting food on the table: It’s about making sure Americans have the chance to be at that table with their loved ones.”

Gene Sperling, who advised both Obama and Clinton, makes the righteous case for economic dignity in his new book and lays out the path forward for our country.

I hope that you will enjoy this excellent book by my friend and thought leader of our time, Gene Sperling. Moms in Office sent out a copy to many of our supporters to say thank you for believing in our mission! Sincerely, Simona Grace, Founder, Moms in Office
---
| [Chip in! ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=77a2478a71&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in! ")
---
|
---
|
---
#### Learn more about Economic Dignity!

[Do the rules and incentives](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=576ef2d3a9&e=3f151f8b74) we design reward the winners of a race to the bottom? Or do they allow for equally vigorous competition that promotes what I have termed _economic dignity_ : the capacity for all of us to care for family, pursue potential and purpose, and participate in the economy without domination and humiliation—not only in our roles as workers, but also as consumer and business competitors?
|
---
#### Economic Dignity by Gene Sperling
["Economic Dignity"](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=b34b86abb2&e=3f151f8b74) has been released in a time of massive upheaval. And it asks us not how we can get "back to normal," but rather how we can reimagine an economy that works for human beings in ways that haven't always seemed like a priority. Gene Sperling was director of the National Economic Council under both President Obama (2011-2014) and President Clinton (1997-2001).

---
#### US Needs To Improve 'Economic Dignity' For All Workers
[The 33 million unemployment claims](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a2521367ce&e=3f151f8b74) paint a picture of a U.S. economy devastated by the coronavirus pandemic. But those numbers don’t give us the most important measure, says economist Gene Sperling, former economic adviser to presidents Bill Clinton and Barack Obama.
|
---
#### In the New York Times!
[Economic dignity means providing people ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a39767aa8f&e=3f151f8b74)with the capacity to care for family, pursue their potential and a sense of purpose, and contribute economically free from domination and humiliation. It is about more than putting food on the table: It’s about making sure Americans have the chance to be at that table with their loved ones. It’s about ensuring that economic deprivation and structural disadvantage don’t deny people life’s most precious, God-given moments, from bonding with newborns to caring for aging parents.
| [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=8903dc43b4&e=3f151f8b74)
---
Why lower-wage workers hardest hit by coronavirus: e.g., 70% lack paid leave: highest childcare burden if schools close: least options to work from home. Morally wrong and lack of economic justice for all = more health risks for all.
| | | | | | | | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a48eaafb86&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=9a40061c89&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=cb9c615ffc&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| | [](www.momsinoffice.org)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Moms in Office, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Moms in Office13351 Riverside Dr # 265Sherman Oaks, CA 91423-2542
[Add us to your address book](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=5b1ae3321e&e=3f151f8b74&c=274d5973f7).

---

name: Christy Smith
subject: The most important thing now is to make sure that every single ballot cast in this race is counted.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

I know it's getting late, so I wanted to give a quick update on tonight's results.

The race is still too early to call. And with thousands of ballots left to be counted, it may take several days for us to get a clear picture.

**The most important thing now is to make sure that every single ballot cast in this race is counted.**

My team and I will be closely monitoring the ongoing count, and we will be sure to update you as we know more tomorrow and in the days ahead.

**[One thing is for sure, we will fight to make sure every vote is counted, no matter what. And if you can chip in right now so we can do just that, I'd be so grateful.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbbc/29776869/9936e3a/569f2876/14707575/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTNfdG9vZWFybHktZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200513_tooearly-full")** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbbc/29776869/9936e3a/569f2876/14707575/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTNfdG9vZWFybHktZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200513_tooearly-full") We will make sure every vote is counted, every voice is heard in this election. We'll have members of our team on standby to observe vote counts and lawyers ready for recounts. Not to mention that no matter the outcome of this race, **we'll be running against Mike Garcia again in November for a full term.**

I want to say a big thank you to everyone on this team. You made phone calls, donated, and sent the kind words and wishes that kept me and my team going over these past seven months.

This would not be possible without you -- so thank you so much for your support.

There is still a lot of work to be done, and this race isn't over yet. So tonight, get some sleep, because tomorrow we still have work to do. Talk to you soon.

\-- Christy

clean_body: | []() | | Hi Peter, I know it's getting late, so I wanted to give a quick update on tonight's results. The race is still too early to call. And with thousands of ballots left to be counted, it may take several days for us to get a clear picture. The most important thing now is to make sure that every single ballot cast in this race is counted. My team and I will be closely monitoring the ongoing count, and we will be sure to update you as we know more tomorrow and in the days ahead. "" "" We will make sure every vote is counted, every voice is heard in this election. We'll have members of our team on standby to observe vote counts and lawyers ready for recounts. Not to mention that no matter the outcome of this race, we'll be running against Mike Garcia again in November for a full term. I want to say a big thank you to everyone on this team. You made phone calls, donated, and sent the kind words and wishes that kept me and my team going over these past seven months. This would not be possible without you -- so thank you so much for your support. There is still a lot of work to be done, and this race isn't over yet. So tonight, get some sleep, because tomorrow we still have work to do. Talk to you soon. \-- Christy "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

name: Chase For Congress
subject: Invitation For Peter: Second Amendment and Energy Town Hall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fotBPMr2_FOQB54BaDkyKgycYJI8vDti4epBjJZP_DPi_eAxLZBvj4AQb6Vw_HfeN_ZLKOcpk0semm0BvBtLCg8vntp0FRBmxYW4Bc6vqv1mMYQT8kMkzohAwL6oHZChFd6ahhrziu4FQGuwCG26ag==&c=9N-OWB5gPuk-icdQTvwar4rnWTC-lxwA1ycdC6EGmAlP3w07POuY7Q==&ch=Sim1homJnaSp1oclkY8UnP6jcVrOFMv3nndyte0lXtJrzm7YkTVZKg==)
---
| Peter \- As one of our top supporters, I'm reaching out today to invite you to an exclusive Second Amendment and energy issues town hall with Congressman Richard Hudson and congressional candidate Claire Chase.
Congressman Hudson is nationally recognized as a defender of our Second Amendment rights and is the champion of concealed carry reciprocity legislation in Congress. Claire Chase recently received the highest rating the NRA gives to political outsiders, AQ.
Congressman Hudson also oversees U.S. Energy Policy as a member of the House Energy & Commerce Committee and Claire Chase is the former Chairman of the New Mexico Oil & Gas Association.
The event will take place via Zoom tomorrow, Thursday, May 14th at 4:00 pm MST. For login information, please RSVP by replying to this email or reach out to [Mike@clairechase.org](mailto:Mike@clairechase.org).
Look forward to seeing you tomorrow!
---
|
---
|
---
| God bless,
---
| Mike Berg Campaign Manager Claire Chase for Congress

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Fwd: The stakes have never been higher.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Elise is right. The stakes have never been higher. We cannot allow Nancy Pelosi, AOC and self-proclaimed socialists to be in charge of the House of Representatives as we work to rebuild our nation and restore American jobs. We must win in November. But in order to win, we need the resources to get our message out.
| | | | Elise is right. The stakes have never been higher. We cannot allow Nancy Pelosi, AOC and self-proclaimed socialists to be in charge of the House of Representatives as we work to rebuild our nation and restore American jobs.

We must win in November. But in order to win, we need the resources to get our message out.

[NicoleMalliotakis.com/donate](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)

Sincerely,
Nicole

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Elise Stefanik
Date: Mon, May 11, 2020 at 6:35 AM
Subject: The stakes have never been higher.
To: [nicole@nicoleforny.com](mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com)

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | Nicole,

The next generation of American leaders will be elected in November.

The people who win this year will help lead us towards economic independence from China - or they will send us spiraling down into economic ruin.

[The stakes have never been higher - that’s why we need Nicole Malliotakis to win her Congressional race and join me in Congress.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)

---
| | |
---
| | [ DONATE TO NICOLE >> ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)
---
| | |
---
| | Nicole is a fighter. Born and raised in New York City, Nicole is the daughter of Greek and Cuban immigrants. Nicole has spent nearly a decade in the State Legislature working tirelessly for her constituents on Staten Island and Brooklyn. When Hurricane Sandy hit, Nicole rolled up her sleeves and got to work - securing funding, delivering supplies, and helping people rebuild. Now Nicole's district is one of the places hit hardest by Coronavirus, and she has once again stepped up securing and delivering protective equipment for first responders, essential workers, and nursing homes.

We need Nicole Malliotakis to flip her BLUE New York City Seat in Staten Island and Brooklyn RED to help us:

We need Nicole Malliotakis to get to Washington to help us:

✔ Take back the House of Representatives

✔ Remove Nancy Pelosi as Speaker

✔ Hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable for the Coronavirus Crisis

✔ Rebuild our economy

President Trump won this seat BIG!

But right now, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the socialist squad are pouring millions of dollars into Nicole’s opponent’s campaign in NY-11. If Nicole loses, it’s one more vote for Nancy Pelosi’s plan to raise taxes, open our borders, and continue to allow China to take American jobs.

I need your help: I’ve already rushed Nicole Malliotakis my support so that we can FLIP THE HOUSE.

[Will you join me and donate $20, $50, even $100 to Nicole today to help her fight back?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)[
](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)
With your help, I know that Nicole will win and we’ll keep our country on the path to recovery.

---
| | |
---
| | [ DONATE TO NICOLE >> ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=155A207A1A2587)
---
| | |
---
| | Elise Stefanik

---
| | |
---
| | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Add your name: We need to protect our workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

Earlier this month, President Trump called for the reopening of meatpacking plants across the country, _despite the fact that they’ve been hotspots for the coronavirus_. In fact, there have been over 2,000 cases in Woodbury County alone because so many meatpacking families live and work in the Sioux City area.

Powerful corporations lobbied the president relentlessly until he declared the plants as critical infrastructure without providing necessary personal protective equipment (PPE), putting thousands of workers at terrible risk.

Once again, we are seeing how the lack of enforcement of antitrust laws hurts our workers and farmers: For decades, corporations have been consolidating the industry, creating bigger and bigger processing plants. Just 50 beef plants process 98% of the beef in our country, so if one goes down, there are big implications to worker safety and our food supply.

This order clearly endangers worker safety, but it also gives our farmers the short end of the stick. Packers dictate how farmers raise their livestock, the price, the market, and a lot of their choices. They also jack up the prices of boxed beef, the output of slaughterhouses, while cutting pay to farmers and ranchers for live cattle just to maximize the profits.

**All of this benefits corporations and leaves our workers and farmers in the dust.**

**[Add your name to our petition calling for safety protections for our workers. We CANNOT put corporate interests above the health and safety of our workers and a fair price for farmers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17477948/195750779/-879374156?ms=em20_200513_workersafety_in&refcode=em20_200513_workersafety_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzBhM2JiNC0zZTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ohb-Gc8PimA4oI3J2wkm5jKG1V8WyYKOH3B1GWyHvRI=&emci=7f5779d1-3295-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a30a3bb4-3e95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17477949/195750780/-879374156?ms=em20_200513_workersafety_in&refcode=em20_200513_workersafety_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzBhM2JiNC0zZTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ohb-Gc8PimA4oI3J2wkm5jKG1V8WyYKOH3B1GWyHvRI=&emci=7f5779d1-3295-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a30a3bb4-3e95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013) No matter what, we’ve seen these multinational corporations will do whatever it takes to earn an extra buck -- even at the expense of workers and farmers, even during a pandemic. Well, corporations have lobbyists to do their bidding; workers and farmers have us.

Instead of forcing our workers back to work in unsafe conditions, let’s:
* Enforce antitrust laws.
* Create more competitive markets so jobs and money stay in our own communities, and not to Wall St and stockholders.
* Hold packers accountable for price-fixing.
* Provide strong health and safety protections for meatpacking plant workers.

**[Enough is enough. We have to act now to save lives, save livelihoods, and save our farming industry as we know it. Add your name to our petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17477950/195750781/-879374156?ms=em20_200513_workersafety_in&refcode=em20_200513_workersafety_in&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzBhM2JiNC0zZTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ohb-Gc8PimA4oI3J2wkm5jKG1V8WyYKOH3B1GWyHvRI=&emci=7f5779d1-3295-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=a30a3bb4-3e95-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6658013)**

Thank you for stepping up and taking action.

The time to act is now.

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten

clean_body: Peter, Earlier this month, President Trump called for the reopening of meatpacking plants across the country, despite the fact that they’ve been hotspots for the coronavirus. In fact, there have been over 2,000 cases in Woodbury County alone because so many meatpacking families live and work in the Sioux City area. Powerful corporations lobbied the president relentlessly until he declared the plants as critical infrastructure without providing necessary personal protective equipment (PPE), putting thousands of workers at terrible risk. Once again, we are seeing how the lack of enforcement of antitrust laws hurts our workers and farmers: For decades, corporations have been consolidating the industry, creating bigger and bigger processing plants. Just 50 beef plants process 98% of the beef in our country, so if one goes down, there are big implications to worker safety and our food supply. This order clearly endangers worker safety, but it also gives our farmers the short end of the stick. Packers dictate how farmers raise their livestock, the price, the market, and a lot of their choices. They also jack up the prices of boxed beef, the output of slaughterhouses, while cutting pay to farmers and ranchers for live cattle just to maximize the profits. All of this benefits corporations and leaves our workers and farmers in the dust. No matter what, we’ve seen these multinational corporations will do whatever it takes to earn an extra buck -- even at the expense of workers and farmers, even during a pandemic. Well, corporations have lobbyists to do their bidding; workers and farmers have us. Instead of forcing our workers back to work in unsafe conditions, let’s: Enforce antitrust laws. Create more competitive markets so jobs and money stay in our own communities, and not to Wall St and stockholders. Hold packers accountable for price-fixing. Provide strong health and safety protections for meatpacking plant workers. Thank you for stepping up and taking action. The time to act is now. Standing Tall for All, J.D. Scholten =

David Perdue has used his position of public trust to enrich himself from the very first days after he was elected to the Senate, according to a new report published yesterday by _The Intercept._

In 2014, he secured stock options from the financial technology company Cardlytics where he served as a board member, options that **“would grow to be worth more than $6 million”** as Perdue **“has worked to roll back regulations that govern firms like Cardlytics...and has sponsored legislation that would be to the firm’s benefit.”**

Already this year, Perdue’s stock trades following a secret Senate briefing on coronavirus have raised ethical red flags, with possible evidence of insider trading. Now we are learning the details of how **he has legislatively engineered the conditions under which his own investment is able to grow.** It bewilders me that such an action is not itself a crime — but it is without question unethical.

Here is the bottom line: David Perdue is not fit to serve. His self-interest and self-regard as Donald Trump’s man in the Senate have led us to a public health and economic crisis.

**Polling shows our race is extremely competitive and Georgia is the battleground state in an expanded Senate map against vulnerable Republican incumbents.**

**Now, polling shows Loeffler (R) and Reverend Warnock (D) in a DEAD HEAT - and McConnell plans to line up the FULL backing of the Republican establishment to make sure she pulls ahead. **
Reverend Raphael Warnock is the strong Democratic leader we need to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. His people-powered campaign is SURGING, but the GOP is pulling out all the stops to defeat him and protect their majority.
Loeffler is spending $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to buy this seat - so if we don't fight back NOW, we'll fall behind and lose our one shot at flipping Georgia blue and taking back the Senate.

name: Gary Peters
subject: re: we're on the air!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
| | |
---
Folks, I've got some great news: We're back on the air with two brand news ads!

While I've been fighting for Michigan workers and families, my opponent has been on the air with his own ad --_**and he 's put nearly $1 million behind it.**_

This is all thanks to Donald Trump and national Republicans funneling millions into Michigan to buy my Senate seat, prop up my opponent and tighten Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate. body:
My team and I are quickly approaching our next fundraising deadline, and we need your help to ensure Chuck Schumer and his handpicked candidate do not gain even more momentum in the fight for Iowa's Senate seat. Can you help us reach our goal by contributing $5, $15, or even $100 before 11:59 PM?
My team and I are quickly approaching our next fundraising deadline, and we need your help to ensure Chuck Schumer and his handpicked candidate do not gain even more momentum in the fight for Iowa's Senate seat. _**Can you help us reach our goal by contributing $5, $15, or even $100 before 11:59 PM?**_
I wouldn't ask for your support if it wasn't important, Friend. You see, the Democrats fighting to flip Iowa's Senate seat care more about the Left's socialist agenda than Iowa's priorities.

Socialized medicine, open borders, gun control, tax hikes, abortion expansion... that's what they're fighting to support.

**These radical policies would CRUSH our Iowa families!**

**Instead, we need to further CUT taxes, REDUCE regulations, INCREASE support for our farmers, SECURE our border, PROTECT the unborn, and SUPPORT our military.**

That is what is best for Iowa, and that is what I am fighting for.

It's grassroots conservatives like you, Friend, who will be the deciding factor for Iowa's future. I hope you'll join me in standing up for Iowa's conservative values and protect our great state from the Left's socialist agenda.

subject: You won't believe this... the swamp is in Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| |
---
| | | Friends,

The Kansas Republican Primary is less than three months away, and already it's clear how Kansans in the 2nd District are voting. **Kansans have given ****Jake LaTurner 3.5 times the amount of money they have given to the incumbent Congressman.** In addition, our campaign has recently received a major endorsement from the Kansas Farm Bureau.

In short, Kansans are voting with their pocketbooks and endorsements, and Jake LaTurner is the clear choice.
---
|
---
| So where are our opponent's fundraising dollars coming from, if not from the Kansans he represents? The answer is simple...the people he really works for...the swamp.

_**Lobbyists and special interest groups in Washington D.C., and people from New York, Illinois, and California are filling Congressman Watkins' campaign coffers with big checks. Don't take our word for it. See for yourself [here.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=62b97deecd&e=1050d051da)**_

People that don't even live in our state are keeping the Watkins campaign afloat. This is exactly what President Trump is fighting against. Over the past 6 months, since Jake LaTurner has entered the race, **Steve Watkins has only reported 18 checks coming from the Kansans he represents**.

We do not need a Congressman continuing to represent us who doesn't own property in Kansas and garners the majority of his financial support from people from other places who don't know what matters to the people that live here. **Kansans should get to decide the outcome of this election, not liberals from D.C., New York, and Illinois. **

Jake was born and raised in this state. His family lives here and he is committed to raising his family here. He cares deeply about our state's success and the well-being of the people who call Kansas home. You can count on him to lead the fight to protect our way of life.

[Donate now to help send someone to DC who will stand for our Kansas values. $50, $25, or even $5 helps. ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1c6781b603&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,

Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: ⏰ The runoff is TWO MONTHS AWAY, and we’re falling behind ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Now is exactly the wrong time to fall behind. MJ must win in order to give us the best chance of defeating Sen. Cornyn this November!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890098/7f51f7bc/4fbac895/4ef149cc/2986236128/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890098/7f51f7bc/4fbac895/4ef149c3/2986236128/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out-nd?refcode=email_20200513.1nd__1373__&amount=10")
---
Big news, Peter:

The good news: Tomorrow marks two months until the Texas Senate runoff, and MJ is in the best position to win and then defeat Sen. Cornyn this November!

The bad news: We didn't meet our fundraising goal yesterday. **That is the _second day_ in a row we've fallen behind and this is exactly the wrong moment for that to happen.**

We're counting on you to help us catch up -- **[so if you can, will you donate before tomorrow's deadline to help us reach our 200 new supporters two months out goal? With all donations being matched, your support will go twice as far.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890098/7f51f7bc/4fbac895/4ef149c3/2986236128/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out-nd?refcode=email_20200513.1nd__1373__&amount=10")**

**It 's going to take a fighter to take down Sen. Cornyn, and MJ has the experience needed to win.** >From flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on the Pentagon to open combat roles to women, she's never backed down from a fight. But she needs your help to win this one.

Sen. Cornyn has nearly $13 million cash on hand thanks to huge support from Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and countless other special interests. Plus, a Koch-backed super PAC announced plans to spend SEVEN FIGURES on this Senate race after the Cook Political Report upgraded the race in MJ's favor!

In contrast, MJ isn't taking any money from corporate PACs. She's counting on YOUR support to build the campaign she needs to beat Sen. Cornyn. And since this grassroots team has helped us reach every goal we've set so far, we're now asking for your help once again.

**If you can, please make a matched donation before tomorrow's two months out deadline to help us reach our 200 new supporters goal, win the runoff, and FLIP THE SENATE.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890098/7f51f7bc/4fbac895/4ef149c3/2986236128/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzNzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out-nd?refcode=email_20200513.1nd__1373__&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890098/7f51f7bc/4fbac895/4ef149c4/2986236128/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Cory Gardner
subject: As of today the Senate isn't safe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY GARDNER FOR SENATE
body:
I don't have much time, but I wanted to make sure that you had a moment to learn more about what's happening with this year's battleground Senate races, including ours right here in Colorado.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._
---

Hey, Friend,

I don't have much time, but I wanted to make sure that you had a moment to learn more about what's happening with this year's battleground Senate races, including ours right here in Colorado.
_
As of today, the Senate isn 't safe.

Many of the top-contested races are in a dead heat.

Democrats are rapidly closing in on us.

Now, the far-Left has kicked their fundraising into overdrive to unseat conservatives like myself and regain control of the Senate. _

**Here 's how we fight back: if our team raises an additional $20,924 by this Friday's mid-month fundraising deadline, then we:
1) Stay ahead of the far-Left's fundraising machine and
2) Keep the upper hand in our race and the race to control the Senate Majority**

Friend, there is very little time to spare until this Friday's mid-month deadline. Don't hesitate to show your support for the pro-growth, common-sense solutions that Senate Republicans like myself are fighting for on behalf of the American people.

clean_body: I don't have much time, but I wanted to make sure that you had a moment to learn more about what's happening with this year's battleground Senate races, including ours right here in Colorado. Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating. And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue. Hey, Friend, I don't have much time, but I wanted to make sure that you had a moment to learn more about what's happening with this year's battleground Senate races, including ours right here in Colorado. As of today, the Senate isn 't safe. Many of the top-contested races are in a dead heat. Democrats are rapidly closing in on us. Now, the far-Left has kicked their fundraising into overdrive to unseat conservatives like myself and regain control of the Senate. Here 's how we fight back: if our team raises an additional $20,924 by this Friday's mid-month fundraising deadline, then we: 1) Stay ahead of the far-Left's fundraising machine and 2) Keep the upper hand in our race and the race to control the Senate Majority Friend, there is very little time to spare until this Friday's mid-month deadline. Don't hesitate to show your support for the pro-growth, common-sense solutions that Senate Republicans like myself are fighting for on behalf of the American people. == == == == == == == Thanks so much for your support today, Friend. I'm looking forward to having you on Team Gardner as we get closer to victory this November. And, don't forget, while your support is much appreciated, we only encourage you to donate if you are financially able to at this time. However, if you are unable to give to our grassroots mission today, we encourage you to sign up == to join our extensive volunteer network! # _**It's time to investigate the investigators**_
Now that the corrupt Justice Department spent nearly 3 years investigating the Russia HOAX, it's finally our turn. Millions of taxpayer dollars were wasted on a sham investigation into President Trump only to come up empty handed. The corruption of the FISA court and our Justice system has been both appalling and unprecedented. And who's at the center of all this corruption? Barrack Hussein Obama.

This political hit job is the biggest scandal our country has seen since Watergate. And as the evidence continues to present itself, it might in fact be WORSE than Watergate. Obama abused our nations FISA system to spy on a political opponent and start a baseless investigation into him. I'm sure when this is all over Obama will go down as the MOST CORRUPT President in United States history!

**I can't wait to get back in congress to investigate Obamas corrupt administration** , **but I need your help!** The corrupt Democratic Party is going to throw all they have at this election to ensure they don't loose their House majority. But, I am confident that I can flip this seat **RED** and add a seat to the Republican side in Congress with your help! **Please donate[here](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=4a7460fcbc&e=90fad69796)**

name: Team Menendez
subject: 👏 Police 👏 Firefighters 👏 EMS 👏 Paramedics 👏 First responders 👏
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friend --

In the fight against COVID-19, it's our first responders -- police, fire, EMS, and others -- who are on the front lines. Each day, they leave the safety of their homes and the comfort of their families to wage war against an invisible enemy.

It's the fire and EMS personnel who answer the call to transport sick Americans from their homes or long-term care facilities to hospitals, often not knowing whether the patient has COVID-19.

It's the police who protect us from crime and public safety issues. And it's the police who have to break up the knuckleheads who violate social distancing guidelines.

**[It's never mattered more to show our first responders that we have their backs as they risk their lives to protect us from COVID-19. Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to the First Responders' Children's Foundation COVID-19 Emergency Response Fund?](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da91/2312331852/VEsH/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_menendez_frcf?refcode=em20_200513_GTfirstresponders_inactive")** [DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da91/2312331852/VEsE/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_menendez_frcf?refcode=em20_200513_GTfirstresponders_inactive") Our first responders are serving on the frontlines of this crisis, they are getting sick, and some are making the ultimate sacrifice.

In the Senate, Bob Menendez is fighting for our heroes by working with Cory Booker, Kirsten Gillibrand, and Chuck Schumer to ensure families of first responders lost to COVID-19 can quickly access survivor benefits.

These frontline heroes step up for us every day, now we need to step up for them.

The First Responders' Children's Foundation COVID-19 Emergency Response Fund is helping first responders experiencing financial hardship, buying hotel rooms, purchasing personal protective gear, and paying for funerals for those who have fallen to the coronavirus.

**[If you're able, please chip in to the First Responders' Children's Foundation COVID-19 Emergency Response Fund today to support first responders and their families in New Jersey and across the United States.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da91/2312331852/VEsF/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_menendez_frcf?refcode=em20_200513_GTfirstresponders_inactive")** [DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da91/2312331852/VEsC/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_menendez_frcf?refcode=em20_200513_GTfirstresponders_inactive") Thank you,

Team Menendez

[https://covid19.nj.gov/](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da92/2312331852/VEsD/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://covid19.nj.gov/")
[https://www.menendez.senate.gov/coronavirus](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542f2e/74d715b9/1acc2e1a/1f49da93/2312331852/VEsA/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://www.menendez.senate.gov/coronavirus")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Era of Offshoring U.S. Jobs Is Over
body:
"Some say crises don’t so much alter the course of history as accelerate changes already underway." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=749160af83&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Era of Offshoring U.S. Jobs Is Over**

“Some say crises don’t so much alter the course of history as accelerate changes already underway. That’s certainly the case when it comes to the coronavirus pandemic and the offshoring of American jobs,” U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer writes in _The New York Times_.

“Every day I talk to business leaders who now acknowledge they underestimated the risk in decisions to move jobs overseas . . . The pandemic has vindicated the Trump trade policy in another way: It has revealed our overreliance on other countries as sources of critical medicines, medical devices and personal protective equipment.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f5be16f07&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Newly released Congressional testimony shows that Adam Schiff spread falsehoods shamelessly about Russia and Donald Trump for three years even as his own committee gathered contrary evidence,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0e70342f9&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| For many Americans, especially in rural communities, access to high-speed broadband is essential now more than ever. Under President Trump, the Agriculture Department “is not letting-up in our strong effort to close the digital divide. We are using every resource available to us to bring this vital connection to rural homes, businesses and essential facilities,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes in [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f66ea79a44&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| A less politicized media would applaud Senior Adviser Jared Kushner’s behind-the-scenes work to mitigate the impact of the Coronavirus. “But because Kushner is part of the Trump administration, and because the work he is doing is part of President Trump’s bold and comprehensive response to the Wuhan virus crisis, Kushner is attacked in a way that a member of a Democrat administration never would be,” Boris Epshteyn writes in [_**Townhall**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=851643c965&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1d153680d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=daeeed800f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=310d2e0d64)

My new book, Dare to Fly, is available for pre-order right now and I'm reaching out today to offer you the chance to claim a SIGNED copy before it's released! Just chip in to help me keep Arizona RED and our campaign will send you a SIGNED copy of my new book! >>
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uat2wDP4VVY3nHMGG5_shEw4gDKzCOlATf0MqnOtBhMeTjs0FOyVuYBYUSAY9c0YJGxq6BFJcPtn6bkuXHHDiD3HCTuXdEEVh3rIov1x5lqvLf_EvRYXjPBmO-z0d6aYMH1uqi0_qykuWJXqM5kDVYIEc7sN9vdTHupVAhax8j4ewWiNk0sWE4iurBgNANOsuwEd2txZ9H3UDKHSm0CaYK0J744oMXioDmfRm2L8o3avvNb92I6AZzx_Qi2JkMYtb8wdosIQJOBpf-fHKrECrpbaaWnrAmYwKWSQihU5R4wsS3T7-rfQ34fWGu4qkOqUwzKxo8oanN62zw-jlNMtm3jftREXPU1n-T6M-Qm01evGxe1IGR8UtECe66V13x5n_PsJJX0ULCK4KwlfjN_2IZbjBBgmuyJ0&c=r_6ojSbpJWTUESS2s2_YeciZk_9MO2x4t9QtH7SevRUe4rAI_WB1dA==&ch=pK-OgPtfTWKYGQ_fF24asyF6JjZ95DAnIUBCTNRsEsngh8iXo7QGcA==)
Friend,

Most people know me by my record as a fierce defender of conservative values, but I want to share more about how I got here and what I learned along the way with supporters like YOU.

My new book, _**Dare to Fly**_ , is available for pre-order right now and I'm reaching out today to offer you the chance to claim a SIGNED copy before it's released! **[Just chip in to help me keep Arizona RED and our campaign will send you a SIGNED copy of my new book!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uat2wDP4VVY3nHMGG5_shEw4gDKzCOlATf0MqnOtBhMeTjs0FOyVuYBYUSAY9c0YMPmAG-n27qpFGReE5fHQdWoiNfmLKIYRaxknNnhmOCGmX2KzGzu4hRvTmddbwqNsrJwPLjltiqnmDoBErVYFCAeLnTxZg0i6RnMCKYl2JglpS6X1pqmblepOl_xHpgjOfyEozrqDbK6Oi5WJy5uDah8c91jsaeAWXd0sU0n0WYOe0MTiaFN9HnDYEpnDbDWXzms0lYiJZ_NhxWjucm0eQIT4t6KdgvbRtqSQqqXyt-NNCrngGoXAGKBZ-V7Y7bGgUcrMhQbiKWiC1jjtWEKx4VEPN0viTLyCHPEi0cHToPH-PIXxLj2WrankhKviposiSJ30cpwuh0EyuhBqqixfreCPVjUgqmxR&c=r_6ojSbpJWTUESS2s2_YeciZk_9MO2x4t9QtH7SevRUe4rAI_WB1dA==&ch=pK-OgPtfTWKYGQ_fF24asyF6JjZ95DAnIUBCTNRsEsngh8iXo7QGcA==) >>**

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uat2wDP4VVY3nHMGG5_shEw4gDKzCOlATf0MqnOtBhMeTjs0FOyVuYBYUSAY9c0YI_KYSqFCsHgcqCsDhZFiKWCI1K8yRRArzfS-LvN8SzzD6JakBYTboyim2BnMwQkcXUZ3HEYqKJklOhHf2B9NsYL_4XXp5gKEnkuCCbg4h9pYb46p_2DRo2NK0n1TRNyoufEAj1z0kJhDeD0SFge__LgvH_YSSNTZUUJm9KxQMMaKRVNPSW74tCEWKKRLrQlmDuFWqy64jyp4Nq63h5n_5vYzl8AmebLWVTo24wlCfNQ4Khz-oAwYu6W0EdFwEEuSc0imQFY1lJApXme3SZsoKjWFlVyNXEC8rYhzvCZ-sHX87yJ1Gcf1adhL8KeYuvUyo8s7DOKtMRRY29wkaOOI0w==&c=r_6ojSbpJWTUESS2s2_YeciZk_9MO2x4t9QtH7SevRUe4rAI_WB1dA==&ch=pK-OgPtfTWKYGQ_fF24asyF6JjZ95DAnIUBCTNRsEsngh8iXo7QGcA==)

Detailed in my book are my very real experiences - from being initially rejected from pilot training to becoming America's first woman to fly a fighter jet in combat, to taking on the Pentagon for making servicewomen deployed to Saudi wear Muslim garb and winning. In the face of adversity, I learned to never give up.

My hope is that _**Dare to Fly**_ will inspire YOU to turn your challenges into opportunities, to break barriers, to endure turbulence, and to find your own path. I can't wait for you to get a chance to read it! name: Zachary Meunier
subject: Fwd: What it will take to win in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Zm4oeVyVi9fWazkX4SSdZAkp6FJ0SHniWVSwoWhYUQ=/6CLfIuMZF-IEFAMPd-5rS_FdoyITpPZHh9JSHYTchSI=)._
* * *
Peter, I can't emphasize this enough: we need to keep building momentum through Iowa's June 2nd Primary if we're going to win in November. **The resources we build now will pay dividends down the road.** We need to stand up for our values in the name of a brighter future by helping Rita WIN! **[We can only win with your support! Donate $20 before our important FEC deadline today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Zm4oeVyVi9fWazkX4SSdZAkp6FJ0SHniWVSwoWhYUQ=/SUjnD9ojSBfByzVQ0Uuk0BgMg7Rq8cT3c6LpUf94D_Q=?refcode=200513-email&amount=20)** Thank you for all you do, Peter. Zachary Meunier
Campaign Manager
Rita Hart for Congress **\------forwarded message------** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Zm4oeVyVi9fWazkX4SSdZAkp6FJ0SHniWVSwoWhYUQ=/Fy5P0_zsVy9SVVpU5oGYPoBTnx_imQvMYT3R19dRLQ0=?refcode=200513-email) Peter, can you believe we are only **21 DAYS AWAY from Iowa 's Congressional Primary?** That also means tomorrow is an important FEC deadline for us \-- this is our last chance to show our opponents that our campaign has the support to go up against the powerful GOP dark-money forces trying to flip IA-02 red! **[Will you help make sure Rita can post the strongest numbers possible by donating today? We have a chance to win one of the most competitive districts in the country -- but we can only do that with support from people like you.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Zm4oeVyVi9fWazkX4SSdZAkp6FJ0SHniWVSwoWhYUQ=/Fy5P0_zsVy9SVVpU5oGYPoBTnx_imQvMYT3R19dRLQ0=?refcode=200513-email)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: _ | ****[CONTRIBUTE $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0Zm4oeVyVi9fWazkX4SSdZAkp6FJ0SHniWVSwoWhYUQ=/Fy5P0_zsVy9SVVpU5oGYPoBTnx_imQvMYT3R19dRLQ0=?refcode=200513-email&amount=5&express_lane=true)****

We need to raise as much money as we can before the primary so we can grow and nurture a volunteer base and infrastructure that will lead us to victory in November! The first step towards doing that is showing how strong we are as we head towards Election Day.
We're excited to keep counting down the days until we get to cast our votes for Rita, but until then, it's critical we keep building a grassroots team of supporters.

body:
|
Yesterday, Dr. Fauci faced the GOP-controlled Senate **and spoke truth to power.**

He faced demeaning questions from Senators who were posturing for the President -- _looking at you, Rand Paul._

[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48ee/4bd7760e/5c5f0ab3/77aed5af/3112258702/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVm9iMjFsY0dodmJtVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci-may?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci")
**But, he stood his ground and gave the country a clear-eyed, honest view of the crisis, and we at 314 are behind Dr. Fauci 100%.**

[Join 314 and stand with Dr. Fauci->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48ee/4bd7760e/5c5f0ab3/77aed5ae/3112258702/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVm9iMjFsY0dodmJtVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci-may?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Join+314+and+stand+with+Dr+Faucirarr&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci")

Team, we all know we are getting the opposite of the truth from President Trump.

As states across the country are preparing to reopen and potentially put citizens in danger, we need Dr. Fauci and competent science-minded public servants now more than ever.

**Listening to science and facts is how we can get out of this mess.**

[If you agree, then join 314 and stand with Dr. Fauci.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48ee/4bd7760e/5c5f0ab3/77aed5ac/3112258702/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVm9iMjFsY0dodmJtVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/stand-with-dr-fauci-may?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+If+you+agree+then+join+314+and+stand+wit&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 2.1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb48ee/4bd7760e/5c5f0ab3/77aed5a9/3112258702/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200513_1MC_none_STD_1_standwithfauci")** to make a donation.

So guess who is making last minute spends against us? Billionaires...but of course. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH718Vyual42MoilCOmDvOGkj7rSnkkIvwUevqOuoAE8YEwDhRVsgB65u2ep8416vkEGK2C7DEzMCsIJH9mUUbCHIgcUHXnt7i-2FZgqBJk-2BCf9fhyvxSrQiaQwfDUXE2Y-2FPTF0EiexMnyFWN8B1YcTQb1N690Eq41EUXPJ6-2B3G22mBL9uAdtH-2B5E9pp3ErrpxnG7CK/_XUK)

Hi Friend, Every Congressional candidate must file reports with the FEC prior to Election Day to show the public who is coming into the race with last minute money. So guess who is making last minute spends to prop up the incumbent? Billionaires...but of course. Billionaires with hedge funds. Billionaire Nat Simons just pitched in a legal max of $5,600 to the incumbent. He is co-chairman - with his father Jim Simons - of Renaissance Technologies, one of the world's largest hedge funds with $165 billion under management. The Simons family was exposed by the 2017 leak of the [Paradise Papers](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h1/qZ6En2Z-2BLK1CXzHPG4jyN-2FxFokUuzi7KXRrUVurpCtExAppsiLMKEkbr-2B-2Bc6Fp7IGlhsP2Ego1SyekpgxFlbjYlVqKvIXzhBT-2B0lVWOO5JppfnXQg4V2fK7W3E49YSH7DP4TufnxNfwvKD-2F6zYHzahsIeKTpT1wKlZHe788a8wMPZ5N-2BxCm-2Bg9bIXNZlOp1P2-2FlxnwFFzGnScTTJZVGFFTyTWIRYiVeBxX9MTbjMeSDZN68OyGjFap-2BYlZrMYD2-2BNfdC9c6xq4YcFjqGPe2Kw1jgh0bUwPQlcoAG-2BmSpinvbOmj6CQ5YtttncdWhnKs97YU9Vl3OloJkwN9h-2FhPapUgusRVMPAz5ZWq0jU1-2FZZ4BmKH-2B23-2BoIfuwaK9fvSEE/R5EZ) for their $7.25 billion offshore tax haven in Bermuda, the largest such trust fund ever discovered. They've recently been in talks with the IRS for billions in taxes owed.[[1](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h2/WVK7vqVh-2FQ9ljAXB6iXH-2Fv0V6KAT-2F3vguDsPwoFNqobuNJWaJXGu-2Fib8QuIu32WsFu-2BWtXXauy3BHhThY-2B-2Beu0b9Cs0FWanblRqWUamdB3BixAUNLxyalii2h89NVmTaH-2BQWmdI1FCoqy7R7gp-2F-2B7pNOz-2F79gpqnhKHhUAS8L9tf-2FHwgpmEiP7Tcim5wv4PLU8tIJhWYRi11Wd-2BxHc61B0zUfaCxeHHB9JzcnoriafHwQTEWGq8P3wycGugQpnlUz6gtWG6YE5z36-2Fk7H7-2BW5m-2BRZ4KvOCWWlTN-2FOWDNnqg8zj9bl2a3Wh-2B2383jc35ajf0n-2Bqc3a0Ogu5nuP9ZztQaNrnXB2puj7HNO0mEHEmvomgpo8X8EyTicA5WY98vdxWgPStmrkma-2BOvHV0iGb4w-3D-3D/VChp)]. Billionaire Josh Bekenstein, chairman of Bain Capital, with over $150 Billion under management, also dropped $5,600 to prop up Defazio. Bekenstein is a named defendant in a lawsuit over Bain's infamous cannibalizing of Toys'R'Us, which paid out hundreds of millions to Bain and execs while laying off 33,000 employees overnight with no severance pay. [[2](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h3/xC0dw1cejtsyABW4Ew-2FWGfB0pJtTZgfRJM7A6AOOrjbBNQPbW7-2BVf7QtMO0fPQBIdQQwkufbo63jijcsgq4QtY6cTynXXlkf1N43uY8VYoc8-2FlAcOSyUQ3fTIaFjmsl0Q0L2Xa7FU4oju-2FkezuPP67YHjYeYEG6VW-2Byz38StLS3WsjXEOKtNZYX-2BZizIWNLauOlvJusf1FEAyEd79ftL1lDnsnSd3HVkEF2w740qCxx-2B9veAQF94jxPK0tPfsTCyvoeqCbpilqEtU7T8rJs92R0v37fL44S4ntUVO83BDrANamcjtqjzdOOTm9sqMjaSj5LVS7G-2BnE40eNUlxiRLmhDswiYfRrrieuFTCxNd7-2Br5qaDJ1lT1ZNIMeU0tb3RcZZgnCM-2FwBndzv8LHI76nBySEvQS6vfA-2B8cnwi-2FX88wk-3D/faxV)] This led to a Congressional inquiry addressed to Bekenstein in 2018 (obviously DeFazio wasn't among the signatories).[[3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h4/l-2BvrkXZcIrd4V74Tu4BiDiSSipALpd-2BjYSoR37Ncw77mS0-2FwzSE5e2J7X1tIe9YJHD-2Fv6qm-2FDrrT7psE0I7BXYlLF42tlB8apl9-2BXQMcNIWehA8b-2BVMKakTcRVM-2B770FTm-2BicpfCX4ooa6eOI2VlZLiVUuQI2SZ6fD1-2BYTdwKa-2BltUPQlFDTrLoBWJsEmQW4cWcRrx0RnpDtVa0eKeZrULeZR-2Bo3G7ZOCVpZtXGqop18uQQc0ejegpPC3E87gHq7XZbLLoTUIHt-2F5RzZI4yOaetF-2Bs8rdVDyIBwg-2BPCx2uxhyzW2p0Nbp-2FzNLaGx5cfCviYfDLgDSjN6OaQnwx7SBbwvTIVaR-2BBvPgEgY9phzoKRORTjUVgRsDwwgvpHQArDy7FoU1OBLV8jyJ9BIbu55w-3D-3D/FLbX)] Another $5,600 came in from Boston billionaire Seth Klarman, whose hedge fund manages over $27 Billion in assets. He famously tried to hide his holdings in [Puerto Rican debt](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h5/FjjDnILCuToBIudnotke-2FMue1ezbodGluO8V-2FVLYRNyBVdC-2BiEEwYVXmbZ87HMmaOIJE85w-2BtYjtptZ2hkIjSOI4pEgVCsNKCpFNAljF3b0K5Y-2FGbEF-2FX5Nbs2ZtJ3-2F4bFBc1bOg2tXik3-2BdO9bdSfxISxraWKoqmwrnyNv-2Bm-2Bkh9lxryn6mp1-2BdZ2D4Yv5CwFJ9kkha8WsvnWSdXDtCSp64GL2UZw1ZM0uvAn8jJqMl4kp5pEn2OGnsWipAGE-2Bgb0VcSt6CRcTF-2FMSavlZD3cjl30SdzuO-2FqrC40H9y3zt2V9qUTZmuNl9k9nxk276iAN-2Bn398ozEYBRTitOEu4sikWi0LDcGCGWRQg5u1T6BzsyA0mkQX6FHZITgOJi-2B7P2rSRbB5tuAo6TQLkSvwp9w-3D-3D/txFJ) in the wake Hurricane Maria followed by brutal austerity on the island, making him a target for human rights activists who want the debt cancelled. His fund is also heavily invested in fracking. He has been blunt recently about his concerns that if Wall Street bankers and business leaders doesn't start changing their greedy ways, "somebody [in government] is going to come in and do it for them." [[4](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h6/wqujeHhcN2MiIGIU7ZMD4MGm-2B9J6ZD2uoeR23fsrmpMdHTuq6FmFXz7pcDULOsQBTvEGMsBdjiUTlpKQ4O3KO0QaDNm45Zgybk9bFBQo9eWVMqmSEE77GDRs-2FPPR1AVRXzbDmuc8Zn6OeT1dwjRxR9iWpQvYNq-2B65UfxXpAmPkXCArSEvrOOvNGnPM7C-2FjuaZHinx9BK5yd41o3hgJuNYhY8vCjAtho-2FNGRgfieNaI90PWK-2FeqWF19LKIJ-2FNzRst432UN9iKkSxj3D00ELP5-2ByWZ3Q3Rhw-2FgN3BxpbY8REE-2FKc-2Fn7tXgJLo1BL8rwpb1P0RDK9TvUFjJ8-2FczeCdEyhwiI7tiEJ0iLvsKcXQENQHyp615b89HrFDbTdhJidKsOLVsQCIUMTSsFNESjx965F3CJ67Jslruz44MYaUdPW4-3D/XXZG)] Somebody, like Doyle. We are now just 6 days away from our election, and we're not going to let billionaires buy it. Every hour is crucial from here on out, and our volunteers are making thousands of calls. We urgently need your support to keep the campaign going full tilt, right now. Just like you, billionaires donate to candidates who share _their_ priorities. We need leadership that shares our priorities: housing, healthcare, hunger, climate. That's why Doyle is in this fight and that's why she needs your support today. Almost a third of Oregon Democrats have already voted by mail, and of those - most are over the age of 65. That means that, to win, we need to reach out to younger voters and make sure they send back their ballot ASAP. Thank you to everyone who has chipped in from our emails, calls, and texts of the past few days. We're really close to meeting our goal. If you can donate anything at all, [now is the moment when we must put all the chips on the table](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/9gA/ni0YAA/t.31q/Gr9yhq9UTmKgb6pjgAqxGQ/h14/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLKfMVBcsdNWxsekRveoNXM8SrnaFLTvVG1puLyWB-2BxCJrwNYBIV1VyFJFp-2FzPGhVpB9Bcmcy7wvWro48Rwq5SYE1Mg2HA1oljKinc8cD53jd2imdjOptZq3ryYmpjIUrqSRRaqAQV5otiRJ-2FesXizmhAJOk2Ev-2B2hUqbGt1QKJAsTw4zWZTBsX7bj0fpCY-2FWNnrB5i5YQGhuinXSSedZ3jXvTGtgu1vVbFNcAL-2BuhauYiNy0DTMJv1x6OtDGe5klXBGQlzETbxWvgfvRCuDYW8e3fGkGO7ey-2BuMm7-2FXFEThDSvGd9I3FXmrB9jNES2eGiGDJacDOLvM62vj-2BnqZ6NZ5NiFOE-2FpqsiSwoPjXRQ06w-3D-3D/s6wO). The billionaire hedge funders certainly are. Stay well, and stay in the fight! Onward, Doyle Canning

clean_body: So guess who is making last minute spends against us? Billionaires...but of course. | | Hi Friend, Every Congressional candidate must file reports with the FEC prior to Election Day to show the public who is coming into the race with last minute money. So guess who is making last minute spends to prop up the incumbent? Billionaires...but of course. Billionaires with hedge funds. Billionaire Nat Simons just pitched in a legal max of $5,600 to the incumbent. He is co-chairman - with his father Jim Simons - of Renaissance Technologies, one of the world's largest hedge funds with $165 billion under management. The Simons family was exposed by the 2017 leak of the for their $7.25 billion offshore tax haven in Bermuda, the largest such trust fund ever discovered. They've recently been in talks with the IRS for billions in taxes owed.]. Billionaire Josh Bekenstein, chairman of Bain Capital, with over $150 Billion under management, also dropped $5,600 to prop up Defazio. Bekenstein is a named defendant in a lawsuit over Bain's infamous cannibalizing of Toys'R'Us, which paid out hundreds of millions to Bain and execs while laying off 33,000 employees overnight with no severance pay. ] This led to a Congressional inquiry addressed to Bekenstein in 2018 (obviously DeFazio wasn't among the signatories).] Another $5,600 came in from Boston billionaire Seth Klarman, whose hedge fund manages over $27 Billion in assets. He famously tried to hide his holdings in in the wake Hurricane Maria followed by brutal austerity on the island, making him a target for human rights activists who want the debt cancelled. His fund is also heavily invested in fracking. He has been blunt recently about his concerns that if Wall Street bankers and business leaders doesn't start changing their greedy ways, "somebody [in government] is going to come in and do it for them." ] Somebody, like Doyle. We are now just 6 days away from our election, and we're not going to let billionaires buy it. Every hour is crucial from here on out, and our volunteers are making thousands of calls. We urgently need your support to keep the campaign going full tilt, right now. Just like you, billionaires donate to candidates who share their priorities. We need leadership that shares our priorities: housing, healthcare, hunger, climate. That's why Doyle is in this fight and that's why she needs your support today. Almost a third of Oregon Democrats have already voted by mail, and of those - most are over the age of 65. That means that, to win, we need to reach out to younger voters and make sure they send back their ballot ASAP. Thank you to everyone who has chipped in from our emails, calls, and texts of the past few days. We're really close to meeting our goal. If you can donate anything at all, . The billionaire hedge funders certainly are. Stay well, and stay in the fight! Onward, Doyle Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

body:
Ashley Hinson emailed our team last night and told us that our yard signs are flying off the shelves! We are dangerously low on yard signs and need to order a new batch ASAP.
Friend --
This just in: Ashley Hinson emailed our team last night and told us that our yard signs are flying off the shelves! [_**We are dangerously low on yard signs and need to order a new batch ASAP**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001auh_gZoC94b-TjB1Dc1PN8oHMvSE6a7FHjcEpjeY6zKrRZLRbLYvj8TAAY_KKhV3v3IzcfVolgXZkC4cuXwAIf1ecY5T_KcQSPQGaaLTmnDuqayOSpK428ey6VENmZhOTpj47WKkB7ElzWISeWVRVFl-_qrq35SQfYA806i9Y35nRCPVgaPmH66rL77O-P7zk8LqFMHwUdawpSZUUMw3UOTcH3sO8qIAn8-j-kvcRDa7wvvZ9j2iwYnZ87nFXnkvT4xOSXVx-5U4dvUsKMkiscCUG1qajExdjTfnqQgbWjTaSLrU_f3tY87fXDz-ir6CAas9rWW9hrhdwWfHZecJ1sjCAHCxHY0pX7gB8FGxvNv8CLfAQg7nX5ZpOGDx_A4cXh-DRp-KCns=&c=3AjigFKqjPVgJL8rsQoECdF6eJYz9zAVHVqJscYI8IfwsgXihz-G4g==&ch=G9p7NqkDQ46R_AzwAs5M6-cbNL1uYI9vhUl33vaWOuW44cuavTnGBQ==). Because our latest batch went faster than expected -- we are reaching out to you, our most dedicated supporters for help to order additional signs!
[_**Our campaign is running a tight race in one of the top races in the nation!**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001auh_gZoC94b-TjB1Dc1PN8oHMvSE6a7FHjcEpjeY6zKrRZLRbLYvj8TAAY_KKhV3v3IzcfVolgXZkC4cuXwAIf1ecY5T_KcQSPQGaaLTmnDuqayOSpK428ey6VENmZhOTpj47WKkB7ElzWISeWVRVFl-_qrq35SQfYA806i9Y35nRCPVgaPmH66rL77O-P7zk8LqFMHwUdawpSZUUMw3UOTcH3sO8qIAn8-j-kvcRDa7wvvZ9j2iwYnZ87nFXnkvT4xOSXVx-5U4dvUsKMkiscCUG1qajExdjTfnqQgbWjTaSLrU_f3tY87fXDz-ir6CAas9rWW9hrhdwWfHZecJ1sjCAHCxHY0pX7gB8FGxvNv8CLfAQg7nX5ZpOGDx_A4cXh-DRp-KCns=&c=3AjigFKqjPVgJL8rsQoECdF6eJYz9zAVHVqJscYI8IfwsgXihz-G4g==&ch=G9p7NqkDQ46R_AzwAs5M6-cbNL1uYI9vhUl33vaWOuW44cuavTnGBQ==) Far left liberal Abby Finkenauer is courting Nancy Pelosi’s SuperPAC in hopes of bailing her out in November.

subject: It’s being called one of the “biggest cover ups” in American history. Here's how you can help out.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We have to get to the truth of #OBAMAGATE. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f707068f96ae/calling-all-patriots-12439718?e=795c6d9796)
