| | [INVESTIGATE OBAMAGATE >> SIGN THE PETITION](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=45f90c421b&e=795c6d9796 "INVESTIGATE OBAMAGATE >> SIGN THE PETITION")
---
| Peter,

General Michael Flynn is an American hero who had his named **dragged through the mud.**

Barack Obama and his merry band of Democrat henchmen, Joe Biden, James Comey, and James Clapper **planted the theory** that the Trump administration colluded with Russia to win the 2016 election.

This led to the FBI's strong-arming of General Flynn into resigning in disgrace and pleading guilty to bogus charges.

**This is bigger than Watergate, and the liberal media is largely ignoring it.**

So it's time to take action. We're starting a petition for Congress to investigate Obamagate.

This is being called "one of the biggest" cover-ups in American history. It's time to get to the truth.

[**Congress needs to act now! SIGN THE PETITION TODAY and then share, tweet, or forward this email to at least 3 people.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9e38c47ac2&e=795c6d9796)

| [We're going to need your financial support as well, if we're going to stop liberal Kendra Horn from covering up for Obama and his henchmen. Donate now to help send a fearless conservative to Washington to investigate corruption and cover-ups.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e93a9627ef&e=795c6d9796)

I have over 24 years under my belt running a small business. I have over 40 in the oil & gas industry.

**There is no one in this race more experience and more battle-tested**. When I get to Washington, I'm going to take that experience and toughness to the halls of Congress in the Obamagate investigation.

The rule of law and justice must be served. **Do not allow Kendra Horn to sweep it under the rug.**

[**Let's put the pressure on Congress! SIGN THE PETITION to tell them to investigate Obamagate and then forward this email to just 3 of your friends.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=87169a8103&e=795c6d9796)
Thank you and God bless America,

Janet Barresi

[P.S. We need all the help we can get to fight Kendra Horn's liberal Democrat money flowing in. Chip in $5, $10 or even $25 dollars now and let's send a conservative to Congress who will investigate Obamagate!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c18d3c2fd7&e=795c6d9796)

| | On women's health, voter suppression, and every issue in between: Ruth Bader Ginsburg has our back. EVEN FROM THE HOSPITAL! On women's health, voter suppression, and every issue in between: Ruth Bader Ginsburg has our back. **EVEN FROM THE HOSPITAL!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049d/72412298/4f25d331/6104aa60/3765231758/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2") Peter, Republicans are furious about RBG's tireless advocacy. We need to rally behind her right now and show her that the groundswell of grassroots supporters she has in her corner is INSURMOUNTABLE! Over the weekend we were AMAZED by the outpouring of gratitude for Justice Ginsburg from our grassroots digital supporters! _But, Peter, we 've checked our records and it looks like your signature is missing from our RBG thank you card._ **Peter, you 're in luck -- we still need 1,423 signatures to reach our 10,000 signature goal! This is your LAST CHANCE to sign the card -- we're planning on sending her the card TONIGHT. [Can we count on you to be one of those signatures today?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049d/72412298/4f25d331/6104aa63/3765231758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+be+one+of+those+s&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2")** | | | [Sign RBG's Thank You Card >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049d/72412298/4f25d331/6104aa62/3765231758/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Sign+RBGrsquos+Thank+You+Card+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2")

**RBG 's fearless words in support of a woman's right to choose are already being scourged by Anti-Choice Republicans! We need to show Justice Ginsburg that we're on her side -- and we will counter any attack raged against her! [Will you be one of our 1,423 signatures in the next 12 hours thanking her for her important advocacy?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d049d/72412298/4f25d331/6104aa64/3765231758/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Will+you+be+one+of+our+1423+signatures+i&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200513_RBGReUp_U2_X2")**

Peter, you 're in luck -- we still need 1,423 signatures to reach our 10,000 signature goal! This is your LAST CHANCE to sign the card -- we're planning on sending her the card TONIGHT. "" | | | "" "" RBG 's fearless words in support of a woman's right to choose are already being scourged by Anti-Choice Republicans! We need to show Justice Ginsburg that we're on her side -- and we will counter any attack raged against her! "" | | "" Thanks, team! \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Since then she's fought for lower taxes and pledged to oppose all tax raises. She's dedicated herself to quick, common-sense reforms, and has even returned over $400 million to California taxpayers. That's why she's the conservative fighter we need in Congress fighting on behalf of our conservative values and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda.

[**We need tax-fighters like Michelle representing us now more than ever. Can you rush in a donation right now to help us close the fundraising gap?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YkMK6MebJWQ_8g7YiQdAwGTu6VreS-_f4BdmwzuTUTlbDmV-jVIa2tOonPfNQXPC4A7PROv0LqF_FQF_UH4xc41W4--3J4nHqr3KbSXoxxRrgyRDy6vCd2giJTwoy05Vgwc5xW1NFUe-5kEJkvLwwShOUVXqk03b0y1wXgoJ8dFwQPbpxHT1maGVl6xsTInqcHL0-dql2WyArtIMeEQYEvpWq6jwbEcQvYoXh692L0pxHmb414cGXRbPV7AO1wB-kcJKRGo6jF5hIb_6jH85AxJFlEEwdD4SQi2_gtdmyrTqhO0Jl19n_U0obzIZ8yzxGJhk3cm-bqJPJlggMJasBuuM2D5HZz8WItLS-cYzlRwgFwYj9YQ5iU5ZmfETrpRKHFJFg2yt4kYmYgDZYrdsiakmyXKVGiUZ&c=ogIgEpJygRycMQFiqqrd8wUPz5KGU3ybDSJM3bDLTq7GAYqNPQhCAA==&ch=hzxzxgNjnUcM3R1bvYzQ3cqcMRSGrdCXoRfCDVBFTBUR-1zlq2Qi2w==)

We're at a critical juncture. Without your immediate support, we'll fall behind. With the House Majority on the line, that's not a risk we can take.

Thank you,

May 11, 2020 "The largest buys include $3.1 million in the New York City market... and $3.25 million in the Los Angeles market, which covers seats held by Democratic Reps. Harley Rouda..." \--- With our opponent's massive war chest and up to $3.25 million more of the Democratic's millions on the way to attack us, we need an emergency grassroots surge to help us stay in the fight. == == == == == As a young woman, Michelle watched her mother, a single mom and small business owner, fall victim to a broken political system. Since then she's fought for lower taxes and pledged to oppose all tax raises. She's dedicated herself to quick, common-sense reforms, and has even returned over $400 million to California taxpayers. That's why she's the conservative fighter we need in Congress fighting on behalf of our conservative values and putting an end to the Left's socialist agenda. == We're at a critical juncture. Without your immediate support, we'll fall behind. With the House Majority on the line, that's not a risk we can take. Thank you, Steph Team Steel | With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17482374/195842113/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzkyOTJhOC02NTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlfWeAvwtQJGltt_1eHC1woPgQK-u7_FIXzF8MQ6wX0=&emci=b2086e9e-6095-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ec9292a8-6595-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
I'll be direct, friend.

Friday at midnight marks the mid-way point of the current fundraising quarter, but we are falling short of our goal. **[Can you pitch in right away to help us hit this mark so we can prepare for the months ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17482375/195842114/1147193815?refcode=em-200513-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzkyOTJhOC02NTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlfWeAvwtQJGltt_1eHC1woPgQK-u7_FIXzF8MQ6wX0=)**

I didn’t take the typical path to public office.

Growing up in Barrio Logan, I had the privilege of being born in this country, but my parents did not. I saw how much they struggled in a system that was stacked against them. Working multiple jobs. At times, we couldn't even afford rent.

But we made the most of it, and it was that experience which led me to become a community organizer — working on environmental justice and land use decisions. It's what motivated me to run for office and become the first queer Latina elected to the San Diego City Council. And it's why I’m taking the next step running for Congress.

I know it won’t be easy now -- especially as we grapple with the coronavirus outbreak. But I know this community is ready for meaningful change to expand affordable housing, end poverty, achieve environmental justice, and ensure health care access for all.

And with that, I must ask:

**[I'm up against a big mid-quarter fundraising deadline on Friday, and right now we’re falling short. Can I count on you to contribute $3 to help us pick up the pace? I wouldn’t reach out like this if it wasn't important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17482376/195842115/1147193815?refcode=em-200513-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzkyOTJhOC02NTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlfWeAvwtQJGltt_1eHC1woPgQK-u7_FIXzF8MQ6wX0=)** _If you've save your information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will be processed immediately._ | | | ****[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17482377/195842116/1147193815?refcode=em-200513-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzkyOTJhOC02NTk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlfWeAvwtQJGltt_1eHC1woPgQK-u7_FIXzF8MQ6wX0=)****

name: Warner for Virginia
subject: Building a new strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're taking our voter registration strategy online to make sure that every Virginian has the opportunity to cast their ballot this November.
|
---
| | | [We're building a new voter registration strategy](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b8/53d9897e/54eadca7/1c8873cc/1291716163/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200513_f_1_nd__575__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---

Derek --

These days, we're all doing things differently to keep our communities safer and healthier: putting off travel plans, staying home as much as possible, and wearing face coverings in public. We're also looking for new ways to safely connect with voters.

For example, a few months ago we had volunteers ready to fan out across the Commonwealth to knock on doors and register record numbers of new voters -- this was a critical part of our winning strategy. But since we've been practicing physical distancing, voter registration numbers in Virginia (and across the country) are way below what we were hoping. In this chart, the red line is new voter registrations in 2020, and you can see the sudden drop in April.
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b8/53d9897e/54eadca7/1c8873cb/1291716163/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200513_f_1_nd__575__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
_Source: VPAP.org, 4/30/20_
We're already shifting our campaign online: offering volunteering opportunities, moving town hall events online, and connecting with our supporters weekly to make sure they have the information and resources they need. **Now, we 're taking our voter registration strategy online, to make sure that every Virginian has the opportunity to cast their ballot this November.**

**[We need your help-- if you're able, will you make a donation to support our voter registration operation?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b8/53d9897e/54eadca7/1c8873ca/1291716163/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200513_f_1_nd__575__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Everyone on Team Warner is working hard to keep this campaign going strong. Mark and the entire team were looking forward to traveling across Virginia to talk to constituents about the issues that matter in their communities. We're disappointed that we've had to put that on hold for now, but we're turning our attention to making sure everyone has the opportunity to cast their ballot and make their voice heard. It's more important than ever for our campaign to reach folks online.

**[If you're able, will you contribute now to help us fund a new strategy and move our campaign online?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b8/53d9897e/54eadca7/1c8873c9/1291716163/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200513_f_1_nd__575__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

We're focused on sending Mark back to the Senate so he can keep fighting for us. Thank you so much for your support.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4b8/53d9897e/54eadca7/1c8873c8/1291716163/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200513_f_1_nd__575__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
|
---

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: I've had enough! Have you?
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Peter

Our country is **changing** **rapidly. ** Everyday another **business closes** , an **employee is laid off** and **uncertainty enters a new home. **

And yet, we are still told it is too dangerous to head back to work. **Business owners are being arrested for trying to provide for their employees, and their families.**

Our economy is toppling under the** increased unemployment claims**, **mounting** **agricultural crisis** , **child care deficiencies** , and the government continues to spend more and more money, **increasing budget deficits**.

**I have had enough.** Have you?

I have had enough of living out of fear. I have had enough of government telling me what I can or can't do.** I have had enough of the bureaucracy. **

**Now** ,** ** you need a Senator who will **represent you** , **your business** and **your family. **

You need a Senator who** isn't going to DC as a personal accomplishment**, to gain wealth or notoriety (like other candidates in this race).

You need Senator who **supports term limits** , a Senator who **seeks to truly serve the people** and a Senator who will **fight against socialism.**

**Dave Lindstrom is that candidate. **

Are you ready to support Dave and **tell the Party Bosses that you are done with career politicians**? Are you are done with self-seeking politicians who don't represent the people of Kansas?

**It will take an experienced businessman who has had to make tough decisions to help us recover from the disastrous effects of the shutdown. **

Dave Lindstrom can do it.
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate Now to help Dave!](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=713aed13ea&e=41f8e27552 "Donate Now to help Dave!")
---
| Thank you,

Dave Owen
Campaign Chairman- Lindstrom for US Senate
---

|
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter Our country is changing rapidly. Everyday another business closes , an employee is laid off and uncertainty enters a new home. And yet, we are still told it is too dangerous to head back to work. Business owners are being arrested for trying to provide for their employees, and their families. Our economy is toppling under the increased unemployment claims, mounting agricultural crisis , child care deficiencies , and the government continues to spend more and more money, increasing budget deficits. I have had enough. Have you? I have had enough of living out of fear. I have had enough of government telling me what I can or can't do. I have had enough of the bureaucracy. Now , you need a Senator who will represent you , your business and your family. You need a Senator who isn't going to DC as a personal accomplishment, to gain wealth or notoriety (like other candidates in this race). You need Senator who supports term limits , a Senator who seeks to truly serve the people and a Senator who will fight against socialism. Dave Lindstrom is that candidate. Are you ready to support Dave and tell the Party Bosses that you are done with career politicians? Are you are done with self-seeking politicians who don't represent the people of Kansas? It will take an experienced businessman who has had to make tough decisions to help us recover from the disastrous effects of the shutdown. Dave Lindstrom can do it. | | | | "Donate Now to help Dave!" | Thank you, Dave Owen Campaign Chairman- Lindstrom for US Senate | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Lindstrom for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The U.S. Postal Service is now more important than ever, but Trump wants to put an unqualified donor in charge.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where million | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525710/45c30650/1cba140b0/66e925b4/1228961012/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Quick: Name the U.S. Postmaster General.

Drawing a blank? If so, I understand -- they don't usually make the headlines. Typically, they're public servants who quietly rise through the ranks of the U.S. Postal Service before getting the top job.

And their nonpartisan work is powerfully important, especially right now. We're counting on the USPS to deliver essential medicine and supplies, help keep us connected, and even protect our very democracy by making it possible to vote by mail.

But you know who's been appointed as the Trump administration's new Postmaster General? An unqualified political donor named Louis DeJoy -- and he's making headlines for all the wrong reasons.

First, he's never spent a day working at the USPS, but he has donated more than $2 million to the Trump campaign and other Republicans since 2016. He's like the Betsy DeVos of the Postal Service -- no experience in the classroom, but plenty of practice writing big checks to the GOP.

Second, he might be clearing house already. Just yesterday, we got word that the Deputy Postmaster General has also resigned, paving the way for DeJoy to pick his own #2 -- who'll work on vote-by-mail.

**We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where millions could vote by mail.**

**[Add your name if you oppose Louis DeJoy's appointment, and let's fight side by side to shore up the USPS and keep Trump from turning it into a political pawn.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525710/45c30650/1cba140b0/66e925b7/1228961012/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIwOFBfU0dOX1ZPVF9FXzIwMjAwNTEzX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-protect-the-postal-service?source=EMR08P_SGN_VOT_E_20200513_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Like a lot of organizations, the USPS is under heavy financial pressure right now. Congress needs to take action to shore up the Postal Service, and the agency needs experienced, independent leadership.

A strong USPS is vital to one of our biggest priorities this year: making it possible for every eligible voter to stay safe without staying silent in our democracy. That means enhancing the safety of in-person voting and expanding vote-by-mail -- and that depends on the Postal Service.

We've already seen mail carriers and other USPS workers risk their own health to ensure that America keeps running. They deserve a leader who will honor their hard work by running an agency free of political interference.

But the president of the American Postal Workers Union -- a vital institution fighting for public-sector workers -- has released a statement saying he was "deeply concerned" with the process behind a right-wing megadonor ending up as Postmaster General.

There's a lot at stake for the USPS right now, and a lot of decisions to be made about its future. We need to protect its workers and connect our country with continued service, not higher rates, cutbacks, or privatization.

**The Trump administration is once again putting another wealthy donor into a position that demands real experience and leadership -- and at a time when survival of the USPS couldn't be more critical.

This is corruption at its worst. I'm going to keep fighting to root corruption out of our government and put power in the hands of the people -- but I can't do it alone. It's going to take a grassroots movement, and that's exactly what we're building together.**

clean_body: We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where million | | | "" Quick: Name the U.S. Postmaster General. Drawing a blank? If so, I understand -- they don't usually make the headlines. Typically, they're public servants who quietly rise through the ranks of the U.S. Postal Service before getting the top job. And their nonpartisan work is powerfully important, especially right now. We're counting on the USPS to deliver essential medicine and supplies, help keep us connected, and even protect our very democracy by making it possible to vote by mail. But you know who's been appointed as the Trump administration's new Postmaster General? An unqualified political donor named Louis DeJoy -- and he's making headlines for all the wrong reasons. First, he's never spent a day working at the USPS, but he has donated more than $2 million to the Trump campaign and other Republicans since 2016. He's like the Betsy DeVos of the Postal Service -- no experience in the classroom, but plenty of practice writing big checks to the GOP. Second, he might be clearing house already. Just yesterday, we got word that the Deputy Postmaster General has also resigned, paving the way for DeJoy to pick his own #2 -- who'll work on vote-by-mail. We need a qualified Postmaster General who's committed to strengthening the USPS and serving our country, not a partisan cheerleader -- especially now that we're staring down an election where millions could vote by mail. "" Like a lot of organizations, the USPS is under heavy financial pressure right now. Congress needs to take action to shore up the Postal Service, and the agency needs experienced, independent leadership. A strong USPS is vital to one of our biggest priorities this year: making it possible for every eligible voter to stay safe without staying silent in our democracy. That means enhancing the safety of in-person voting and expanding vote-by-mail -- and that depends on the Postal Service. We've already seen mail carriers and other USPS workers risk their own health to ensure that America keeps running. They deserve a leader who will honor their hard work by running an agency free of political interference. But the president of the American Postal Workers Union -- a vital institution fighting for public-sector workers -- has released a statement saying he was "deeply concerned" with the process behind a right-wing megadonor ending up as Postmaster General. There's a lot at stake for the USPS right now, and a lot of decisions to be made about its future. We need to protect its workers and connect our country with continued service, not higher rates, cutbacks, or privatization. The Trump administration is once again putting another wealthy donor into a position that demands real experience and leadership -- and at a time when survival of the USPS couldn't be more critical. This is corruption at its worst. I'm going to keep fighting to root corruption out of our government and put power in the hands of the people -- but I can't do it alone. It's going to take a grassroots movement, and that's exactly what we're building together. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Training an army of contact tracers
body:
A free online course will support thousands of prospective contact tracers

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=92a33182de7e435c945528222ab6132c&_e=ovVSFoYqErlL4ETMP0wvFFkWzGHHDDmlwFb8rB7iopS3AGXUz1V8Pc6QkgVRbkNoyslGczqLyydKoz-EVQAq3mUGso_zu12iX_PXqIULWkjGfrpih_MgPRa_R34pHI9sMll5x5nDA5tvtwhcwNqhZ8TcprUiOgDm6rg5u2z-gXtptniWr2Fke25rt7YFlMy3mOMgbX3zhe8DR-jXzOVALLcDwYzexYSgvhP7Jpy4yII4k3MX4QBum7Alknop7uvqKIZWrtRGySrGJNgQr1Oo0s6vyDjzXIuXnw2jD93XWqdtG4t_hGjS1WHoodDf9dns) Friend,

We joined the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health this week to launch a free online course to train contract tracers who will help stop the spread of COVID-19. The course is [**available online**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=92a33182de7e435c945528222ab6132c&_e=q3q373hn3XmYA-UoBoarUIlE10LCMswQKdTnmc5nyTj4CL6YIC2y2PJxEjXgmGjRJsM4j7tanLS66rwedn6Zqia8oHnuNTkzm-IR0KDQaz5IEI5CcGPlEhjZQOx9tnu73xtf1yM75y8hCAbXP9miyIIR3fNA8GUwh37dx1WoH-Uc4xsjeBMoo9QBAxoQ1kX-33SHTu9v5y78Ar-oUMOUjuoMs4foSlhSO39D5QunFGbeWeBm54G1XCxPmvNjVmMCUDfdigUN3iZuJUeX3b0uDbONkd5DivlYaFiLMbGvldFUrqPTkC2Wju79wgv3AjKNcR2NDqGXewZuF47KapO4JBnXHVOesAGqzI1QE6gtPn0%3D) and is open to anyone in the world, whether they are being hired to become a contact tracer or just want to understand the process. **Watch a video with course instructor Dr. Emily Gurley about why this is an important first step:** | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=92a33182de7e435c945528222ab6132c&_e=ovVSFoYqErlL4ETMP0wvFFkxbtaayUNyD2_qJo3In08FsarIJIxHOePyRJtLUzQ37px6fmTjbdR9SbQUy3HYFMqjJ8g6bPJirrwpFX_AxlO5UNMEnoU05ibvX4zQulanmO4KqZofPYtnOavUIcf0Cu4wQwTTxDj52qWT8r0zPruMAY9uF82JuDye6AmgBdiI-ZyZmrGlLcdDLlr-O8N3ikUU2H7TCICvKOXaSAvjs_gUnaSl-z0jKHfwMcMftr4TQd_WJZo3zRHEelVfJyI7REebW7RW1NctxiqSIFnk_pj5PfSEDBHihhSOxbkJzqg0)
---
The course is one component of a new initiative to develop a large-scale contact tracing program in New York State. The Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health, the top rated public health school in the nation, developed the training for prospective contact tracers, who will have to complete this course as a requirement for being hired by the State of New York to fight the pandemic. The course is also free for health departments in cities and states across the country and around the world to use as they expand their own contact tracing.

**Read more on the free online course here:**
[**https://bloombg.org/35Pa7iJ**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=92a33182de7e435c945528222ab6132c&_e=ovVSFoYqErlL4ETMP0wvFFkWzGHHDDmlwFb8rB7iopTYgFnrbVwSlAVOnEfa0PVON60JG0J4Kt5D_OHD9lsJvyy4eymDfmZxmLn7De7RcqJ-K-pQjv7nYWw84EHuRpOgPV93Qc85wwGX_wIOE9ztLxqi4_45gDvSMZj7dQHA4d261XchUhm_v1-IRGZvxq3X5h2LP8dWx4Bswyei6tZCKDEQYiXb1g6WeE_sUVbV3tXF-bT6Fbzu28P59AWGgKrHGiNJ2uGn2JLkM5BCHAKMTNAVi19DBojgB7UTVny8TobyWAuk4PjEPgOoPWrTohjwsXJIF1JLy0Epw6R1C9B4A_414A3Gl5A39KdzTiia3sYAkKbSxzQRmCV7jE0na9JBGBsmMJCe87Dx9JyhG0mKv_zPtfLrzTe8g79IGIRih7_e6-ombTgNPG5zpMAS_5j6bbh9MVgSI0cti7jSyrb4htV2HFnvk3FbJBKVUq-s4cc%3D)

Hey there Friend, Steve Scalise recorded a video message for us and as one of our top grassroots supporters we thought you might want to hear what he has to say. [**Click the video below to play.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf7G8Km9rveH2ybNLfWMn6a7RJ7FMBhd9YiTRxFEJjAR17Tp_p159O-ldMA-Jl7fVeDuCi8thLYMPCY5YqbuSIG8F4VNFot9gH2PEJ6UhXEZMx4AQTFYD1vy5KLtbh5EU6KSC7JBPvvVHb0FM-6RrjsbrsnVMBCyJAxk_Y_ax9MrypLEVGyb4-IeoRXY_Iez-a3s8JIVg4uPbOwv5VuFAyF_L5efZ_q5zgo-2te8tuLWjDm0LCPqKQa1t_yFKDw_JQetXcNRPrlzo-ydKNcoeSNsI24VbBJzlaCC1ZeUE5qd1UhRa3lda9N2GAagu2Syaa98AIsnfBDRkkyjK8SKc6nX9XhtbUgrn9qlBbXPenUdj6KNB-BYDhikMV5kWHLQ2J_xKOWvRQ5tKOdGSGa9JtpX53VicHrYLRI=&c=qxiXiRas9MYWVoluf2348cxbZ9k01eC3f_ErhxDwLR44aQhNHReygw==&ch=MqmUlWSyUGiJJfF61uBjuVqFicbZPL8NY-Dzi6V8j0AAN8ziUbXwcg==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf7G8Km9rveH2ybNLfWMn6a7RJ7FMBhd9YiTRxFEJjAR17Tp_p159O-ldMA-Jl7fVeDuCi8thLYMPCY5YqbuSIG8F4VNFot9gH2PEJ6UhXEZMx4AQTFYD1vy5KLtbh5EU6KSC7JBPvvVHb0FM-6RrjsbrsnVMBCyJAxk_Y_ax9MrypLEVGyb4-IeoRXY_Iez-a3s8JIVg4uPbOwv5VuFAyF_L5efZ_q5zgo-2te8tuLWjDm0LCPqKQa1t_yFKDw_JQetXcNRPrlzo-ydKNcoeSNsI24VbBJzlaCC1ZeUE5qd1UhRa3lda9N2GAagu2Syaa98AIsnfBDRkkyjK8SKc6nX9XhtbUgrn9qlBbXPenUdj6KNB-BYDhikMV5kWHLQ2J_xKOWvRQ5tKOdGSGa9JtpX53VicHrYLRI=&c=qxiXiRas9MYWVoluf2348cxbZ9k01eC3f_ErhxDwLR44aQhNHReygw==&ch=MqmUlWSyUGiJJfF61uBjuVqFicbZPL8NY-Dzi6V8j0AAN8ziUbXwcg==)
**Transcript** : "_Hi, this is Republican Whip Steve Scalise. I 'm asking you to support my friend, Young Kim, for Congress. Young's a great conservative leader. She's the kind of fighter that we need to restore conservative values to Washington. And, by the way, this is going to be a critical seat in our efforts to take back the House. __[**So please donate today to Young Kim for Congress so that we can restore a conservative, Republican majority to Congress. "**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf7G8Km9rveH2ybNLfWMn6a7RJ7FMBhd9YiTRxFEJjAR17Tp_p159O-ldMA-Jl7fVeDuCi8thLYMPCY5YqbuSIG8F4VNFot9gH2PEJ6UhXEZMx4AQTFYD1vy5KLtbh5EU6KSC7JBPvvVHb0FM-6RrjsbrsnVMBCyJAxk_Y_ax9MrypLEVGyb4-IeoRXY_Iez-a3s8JIVg4uPbOwv5VuFAyF_L5efZ_q5zgo-2te8tuLWjDm0LCPqKQa1t_yFKDw_JQetXcNRPrlzo-ydKNcoeSNsI24VbBJzlaCC1ZeUE5qd1UhRa3lda9N2GAagu2Syaa98AIsnfBDRkkyjK8SKc6nX9XhtbUgrn9qlBbXPenUdj6KNB-BYDhikMV5kWHLQ2J_xKOWvRQ5tKOdGSGa9JtpX53VicHrYLRI=&c=qxiXiRas9MYWVoluf2348cxbZ9k01eC3f_ErhxDwLR44aQhNHReygw==&ch=MqmUlWSyUGiJJfF61uBjuVqFicbZPL8NY-Dzi6V8j0AAN8ziUbXwcg==)_

Young Kim is a proud immigrant and conservative woman, who is running for Congress to fight for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. The Democrats spent $10,000,000.00 against her in 2018 and are willing to spend millions more because...

Like Steve said, this is going to be one of the toughest fights in the nation and a deciding factor in whether or not Republicans will control the House Majority. [**Can we count on you to join the fight?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ed4ifvMYKf7G8Km9rveH2ybNLfWMn6a7RJ7FMBhd9YiTRxFEJjAR17Tp_p159O-ldMA-Jl7fVeDuCi8thLYMPCY5YqbuSIG8F4VNFot9gH2PEJ6UhXEZMx4AQTFYD1vy5KLtbh5EU6KSC7JBPvvVHb0FM-6RrjsbrsnVMBCyJAxk_Y_ax9MrypLEVGyb4-IeoRXY_Iez-a3s8JIVg4uPbOwv5VuFAyF_L5efZ_q5zgo-2te8tuLWjDm0LCPqKQa1t_yFKDw_JQetXcNRPrlzo-ydKNcoeSNsI24VbBJzlaCC1ZeUE5qd1UhRa3lda9N2GAagu2Syaa98AIsnfBDRkkyjK8SKc6nX9XhtbUgrn9qlBbXPenUdj6KNB-BYDhikMV5kWHLQ2J_xKOWvRQ5tKOdGSGa9JtpX53VicHrYLRI=&c=qxiXiRas9MYWVoluf2348cxbZ9k01eC3f_ErhxDwLR44aQhNHReygw==&ch=MqmUlWSyUGiJJfF61uBjuVqFicbZPL8NY-Dzi6V8j0AAN8ziUbXwcg==)

\-- Team Young Alert

* * *
_
During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. subject: Patriot Act votes this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AMASH FOR AMERICA EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE**
body:
The surveillance boosters are at it again! The Senate is voting this week on legislation to reauthorize the Patriot Act without significant reforms. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=08b5ccf9da&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| | Friends,

The surveillance boosters are at it again! The Senate is voting this week on legislation**to reauthorize the Patriot Act _without_ the significant reforms needed to protect your rights.**

Fighting surveillance abuses has been a key priority for Justin throughout his time in Congress. As the government has sought greater warrantless access to Americans' private data, Justin has been a leader in pushing back and fighting to protect our Fourth Amendment-secured rights.

[_**He'll keep up this fight once he's in the White House, and you can help get him there.**_](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=ada7fa1c42&e=b1055dcfe8)
---
| [GIVE NOW >>](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=282ddd82fb&e=b1055dcfe8 "GIVE NOW >>")
---
| Many members of Congress tout their support for civil liberties or complain about the government's privacy violations—and then quietly vote for more surveillance.

In contrast, Justin blasts the government's abuses and _then backs up his words with actions._

In Congress, Justin has consistently voted against expanding surveillance authorities, and he's offered countless bills and amendments to add protections for Americans' rights.

**As president, Justin will veto bills that authorize activities that would violate the Fourth Amendment, and he'll require the FBI and NSA to stop their current abuses.**

Under our system of government, the president must act in accordance with the laws—including and especially the Constitution itself. If Congress passes unconstitutional laws, the president can and should refuse to use those authorities.

**Justin is the only candidate who has committed to doing this once he's in the White House—but he'll need your support.**

[If you care about reining in unconstitutional surveillance and having a president committed to protecting your civil liberties, please join us and consider contributing today.](https://amashforamerica.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a50869b1d817b7ebb49c6b579&id=268e334a4c&e=b1055dcfe8)

—Team Amash

clean_body: The surveillance boosters are at it again! The Senate is voting this week on legislation to reauthorize the Patriot Act without significant reforms. | | | | | | | Friends, The surveillance boosters are at it again! The Senate is voting this week on legislationto reauthorize the Patriot Act without the significant reforms needed to protect your rights. Fighting surveillance abuses has been a key priority for Justin throughout his time in Congress. As the government has sought greater warrantless access to Americans' private data, Justin has been a leader in pushing back and fighting to protect our Fourth Amendment-secured rights. | "GIVE NOW >>" | Many members of Congress tout their support for civil liberties or complain about the government's privacy violations—and then quietly vote for more surveillance. In contrast, Justin blasts the government's abuses and then backs up his words with actions. In Congress, Justin has consistently voted against expanding surveillance authorities, and he's offered countless bills and amendments to add protections for Americans' rights. As president, Justin will veto bills that authorize activities that would violate the Fourth Amendment, and he'll require the FBI and NSA to stop their current abuses. Under our system of government, the president must act in accordance with the laws—including and especially the Constitution itself. If Congress passes unconstitutional laws, the president can and should refuse to use those authorities. Justin is the only candidate who has committed to doing this once he's in the White House—but he'll need your support. —Team Amash | "GIVE $10 >>" | "GIVE $25 >>" | "GIVE $50 >>" | "OTHER >>" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by AMASH FOR AMERICA EXPLORATORY COMMITTEE Copyright © 2020. All rights reserved.

| Hoosier Republican,

You are an important part of our Indiana Republican Party. Even while hunkering down at home, so many of you have made a big difference in making sure Indiana continues to elect strong Republicans in 2020.

**This weekend, we've got another great way for you to support President Trump, Governor Holcomb and our entire Republican team up and down the ballot. And it doesn't even require you to leave your house!

We're holding our next Super Saturday this this Saturday, May 16 -- and we'll be making calls to our fellow Hoosiers all day. Are you in? **
[**\-- > Click here to sign up for the virtual phone bank <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cb29f1bef3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Sign up, and a member of our team will reach out to you to sign up you for a shift (or two). They'll walk you through our easy-to-use technology for the phone bank, and everything you need to know.

Your help during this time will be the difference-maker this year!**Let's continue to put in the work now, so we can make sure we re-elect President Trump and Governor Holcomb, and elect more Republicans across the state in November!**

-Your Indiana Republican Party

name: Team Bennet
subject: [SIGN THE CARD] Thank those working on front lines of this crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483664/195877477/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=)
| | Hello Friend,

[Here at Team Bennet, we just wanted to take a minute to recognize the incredible work that frontline workers are doing in this unprecedented situation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483665/195877478/973055121?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

Doctors, nurses, and other healthcare professionals across Colorado, America, and the world are knowingly heading into danger every day to fight for the wellbeing of our friends, families, and neighbors – [often with shortages of necessary protective gear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483666/195877479/973055121?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

Just as important are the thousands of grocery store workers, food industry employees, and logistics workers who keep us fed, [many of whom also suffer shortages of PPE.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483667/195877480/973055121?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

[We need to do more to protect these pillars of our economy and community. Right now, Michael is in Washington fighting for more PPE, testing, and economic relief for the communities who need it most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483668/195877481/973055121?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

[Please add your name along with Michael’s to our thank-you card expressing our gratitude to all of Colorado’s essential workers during this time of crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483669/195877482/-1636315216?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

| | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17483670/195877483/973055121?source=EM_PET_B1_051320_NATL&email=%%Email%%&firstname=%%Firstname%%&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTJkZDM5MC03Njk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inUwar4oyNcHN48krpNU0-VcWWefpnRGd0rsbvOarJw=&emci=94772a4d-6195-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a2dd390-7695-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=1295540)

Team Bennet

name: Team Marsha
subject: We must hold China accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
Sign our petition to show Washington that we want to hold China accountable for its actions.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI1MjgS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5NjMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
__

Peter,

Since you sent Marsha to the Senate, she's been fighting to increase transparency and awareness of China's dangerous--and growing--role on the world stage. _**In the past several weeks especially, Marsha has been working hard to make sure China is held legally and fiscally responsible for their active role in the spread of COVID-19 and the ongoing pandemic.**_

It is becoming increasingly apparent that Washington Democrats, under the direction of their puppet leaders Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi, only want to deflect blame to President Trump.

We want to show the liberal elites in Washington that Americans will not stand for their partisan games in light of the coronavirus crisis and that we stand with Marsha in holding CHINA accountable.

[**Sign our petition to show Washington that we want to hold China accountable for its actions -> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI1MjgS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5NjMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Democrats are so focused on getting President Trump out of the White House, they refuse to acknowledge China's actions. Let's prove to them that Americans know who really must be held accountable -- China.

With enough signatures, we can show Pelosi and Schumer that Americans demand real action instead of partisan witch hunts.

**[**SIGN THE PETITION -> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI1MjgS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5NjMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

Team Marsha

********
Paid for by Marsha for Senate
---
********

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Pelosi and liberals are trying to STEAL the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Pelosi and the Democrats are trying to rig the November election to ensure that President Trump and his conservative allies lose. Nancy Pelosi's bill would forever change the way elections are conducted in our country. Frankly, it would put our chances of electing a conservative President and Congressional majority in serious jeopardy. If Nancy Pelosi gets her way, Democrats will be able to steal any election and I will be at risk of losing this fall.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42492797&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI3OTcS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

As someone who cares deeply about the future of our country, I wanted to be sure you heard the latest news.

Nancy Pelosi proposed a plan to radically change elections in our country, buried in her 1,800-page bill to exploit the China virus pandemic.

_**Most alarmingly, Pelosi and the Democrats are trying to rig the November election to ensure that President Trump and his conservative allies lose. **_

Nancy Pelosi's bill would forever change the way elections are conducted in our country. Frankly, it would put our chances of electing a conservative President and Congressional majority in serious jeopardy.

If Nancy Pelosi gets her way, **[Democrats will be able to steal any election](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI3OTcS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) and I will be at risk of losing this fall. ******

Pelosi's bill would:
* **ELIMINATE** voter ID laws which help prevent voter fraud.
* **MANDATE** vote by mail which could compromise the integrity of elections.
* **MANDATE NATIONWIDE** the shady practice of ballot harvesting.

Ballot harvesting is when liberal activists go door to door to pick up ballots from unsuspecting voters, and then turn them in to be counted--_after the liberals have had a chance to make sure the voters chose the "right" candidates._

Peter, if we allow Pelosi and her socialist allies to permanently change our elections--_we may never see another Republican President elected.___
[**
Sign my petition to OPPOSE Pelosi 's plan to steal our elections.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI3OTcS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Liberals are still mad that Donald Trump won in 2016 and are worried he is going to win again in 2020, **so they are trying to rig the election against him.**

If you care about the future of our country and ensuring we conduct fair elections--then I need you to join me in this fight.

[**Sign my petition to OPPOSE Pelosi 's plan to steal our elections.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI3OTcS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom Cotton

****[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI0OTI3OTcS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTI5Nzc5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Pelosi's "Zeros Act" is THREE TRILLION DOLLARS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
You won't believe where your money is going | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e5e5291628f5/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12455362?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Wednesday, May 13, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams
Nancy Pelosi's "Zeros Act"**

_Sugar Land Republican Says: "The Problem With Nancy Pelosi's Partisan 'Heroes' Act Is That There Are Too Many 'Zeros' In It, And More Specifically, 12 Of Them. Radical Democrats Like Pelosi And Sri Kulkarni Might Not Have Any Concern With Spending $3T, But They Should At Least Be Concerned With Where It's Going."_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today slammed Democratic Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s so-called ‘Heroes’ Act, the largest in U.S. history, taking issue with both the $3,000,000,000,000 price tag as well as what the proposed legislation contains.

“The problem with Nancy Pelosi’s partisan ‘Heroes’ Act is that there are too many ‘zeros’ in it, and more specifically, 12 of them,” said Wall. “Radical Democrats like Pelosi and Sri Kulkarni might not have any concern with spending $3 Trillion, but they should at least be concerned with where it’s going.”

Wall continued by highlighted some of the more egregious examples of Pelosi’s spending package, and called out Kulkarni for his silence on the spend-a-thon:

* $875 Billion for state ($500B) and local ($375B) government bailouts.
* $25 Billion for the U.S. Postal Service.
* $10 Million for the National Endowment for the Arts.
* $5 Million for new Capitol Hill laptops and cell phones.
* A SALT tax cut for the [wealthy](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=b806e942c1&e=01c99b7fbd).

Wall also highlighted several deficiencies of the bill, pointing out missed opportunities to help Texas’ small businesses, the backbone of our economy:

* Nothing on liability reform, which is crucial for Texas businesses having the confidence to reopen.
* Only $10 Billion in continued small business aid.
* $1.5 Billion for broadband development, but nothing that looks ahead toward the future with 5G.

“Nancy Pelosi’s wasteful spending bill is just one more reason why Texans must keep the 22nd Congressional District in Republican hands, and another reason why we need to get Pelosi out as Speaker,” continued Wall. “That means stopping radical Democrats like Sri Kulkarni from joining Pelosi in Washington, and it means flipping back some of these ‘Dirty 30’ freshman Democrats who spent months pursuing the Impeachment Witch Hunt when we could have been doing so many other things.”
###
---

clean_body: You won't believe where your money is going | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Wednesday, May 13, 2020 | | Conservative Kathaleen Wall Slams Nancy Pelosi's "Zeros Act" Sugar Land Republican Says: "The Problem With Nancy Pelosi's Partisan 'Heroes' Act Is That There Are Too Many 'Zeros' In It, And More Specifically, 12 Of Them. Radical Democrats Like Pelosi And Sri Kulkarni Might Not Have Any Concern With Spending $3T, But They Should At Least Be Concerned With Where It's Going." (Sugar Land, TX) – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today slammed Democratic Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s so-called ‘Heroes’ Act, the largest in U.S. history, taking issue with both the $3,000,000,000,000 price tag as well as what the proposed legislation contains. “The problem with Nancy Pelosi’s partisan ‘Heroes’ Act is that there are too many ‘zeros’ in it, and more specifically, 12 of them,” said Wall. “Radical Democrats like Pelosi and Sri Kulkarni might not have any concern with spending $3 Trillion, but they should at least be concerned with where it’s going.” Wall continued by highlighted some of the more egregious examples of Pelosi’s spending package, and called out Kulkarni for his silence on the spend-a-thon: $875 Billion for state ($500B) and local ($375B) government bailouts. $25 Billion for the U.S. Postal Service. $10 Million for the National Endowment for the Arts. $5 Million for new Capitol Hill laptops and cell phones. A SALT tax cut for the . Wall also highlighted several deficiencies of the bill, pointing out missed opportunities to help Texas’ small businesses, the backbone of our economy: Nothing on liability reform, which is crucial for Texas businesses having the confidence to reopen. Only $10 Billion in continued small business aid. $1.5 Billion for broadband development, but nothing that looks ahead toward the future with 5G. “Nancy Pelosi’s wasteful spending bill is just one more reason why Texans must keep the 22nd Congressional District in Republican hands, and another reason why we need to get Pelosi out as Speaker,” continued Wall. “That means stopping radical Democrats like Sri Kulkarni from joining Pelosi in Washington, and it means flipping back some of these ‘Dirty 30’ freshman Democrats who spent months pursuing the Impeachment Witch Hunt when we could have been doing so many other things.” | | | | | | | Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487 You can or .

| | Whew, Peter, what a whirlwind this campaign has been so far! **Tomorrow marks two months until the runoff election** \-- that's not a lot of time to reach every voter, especially in this environment!

I have to be frank: Yesterday -- for the second day in a row -- we didn't meet our budget goal. **[That's why I'm asking you to pitch in and make a MATCHED donation now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489009a/7f51f7bc/4fbf9146/4ef14a64/3420115274/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzOTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out?refcode=email_20200513.2nd__1393__&amount=10")**

We've been working hard every single day to continue reaching folks virtually -- running an online Organizing Bootcamp, going on a Virtual Road Trip, running text and phone banks, and more. But now I'm asking for your help to keep those critical programs funded so we can win the runoff and defeat Sen. Cornyn. I know this is not an easy time for many, but if you're able, **[we need your support now more than ever.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489009a/7f51f7bc/4fbf9146/4ef14a64/3420115274/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzOTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out?refcode=email_20200513.2nd__1393__&amount=10")**

Now -- just two months from the runoff -- is not the time to let up. We can't miss a single beat moving into the general election. **[If you can, make a matched donation now to help make sure that we're in the best position to take on Sen. Cornyn right from the get-go.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489009a/7f51f7bc/4fbf9146/4ef14a64/3420115274/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEzOTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-two-months-out?refcode=email_20200513.2nd__1393__&amount=10")**

I know I have what it takes to beat Sen. Cornyn, and watching him brush off the suffering of millions of Texans over the past few months has fired me the heck up to do it. But it's going to take a lot of hard work. Our momentum has special interests scared they'll lose their man in the Senate, so they're already pouring money into the race.

With two more months until the runoff election, we've got to use every opportunity to get the message out there to all those undecided Texans, shore up our support, and get ready for what Sen. Cornyn's gonna throw at us. **Can I count on you to pitch in today and have your gift MATCHED? It 's so important.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

subject: Can you help me
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ItY1xBEzcXsQiO9rZt8Cw76DkwErxrZkTVyKzMsZ9M=/QxZr01yihLFdh2B5oRLu_6DreeIy1WVEKXuHZ_XSlL0=?refcode=051320)
| | Friend, This week is the last week of the legislative session. Speaker Hortman and House DFLers are busy at the Capitol working to improve economic security for Minnesotans, invest in jobs and local projects, and ratify our state workers' contracts (many of whom are on the frontlines of COVID-19). Really, there is a lot to do. I have a meeting with Speaker Hortman next week to finalize our campaign plan. This campaign is going to be very different and we need the help of Minnesotans like you to be able to find a path forward in the new normal. The state of Minnesota has a program that allows you to give up to $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be **completely refunded** to you by the state. Yes - really. **Would you consider making a $50 (or $100 per couple) investment in the House DFL campaign?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ItY1xBEzcXsQiO9rZt8Cw76DkwErxrZkTVyKzMsZ9M=/QxZr01yihLFdh2B5oRLu_6DreeIy1WVEKXuHZ_XSlL0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=051320) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ItY1xBEzcXsQiO9rZt8Cw76DkwErxrZkTVyKzMsZ9M=/QxZr01yihLFdh2B5oRLu_6DreeIy1WVEKXuHZ_XSlL0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=051320) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Your refundable contribution will help us protect and expand our progressive House DFL Majority and make sure our response to the COVID-19 crisis is focused on facts and science. Thank you for your continued support. Wishing you and your family good health, **Mark Warren** Finance Director House DFL Campaign [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ItY1xBEzcXsQiO9rZt8Cw76DkwErxrZkTVyKzMsZ9M=/QxZr01yihLFdh2B5oRLu_6DreeIy1WVEKXuHZ_XSlL0=?refcode=051320)

name: Tina Smith
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, you deserve an explanation of exactly why your donation matters now more than ever. Donald Trump has used irresponsible and inflammatory rhetoric to pressure leaders across the country to prematurely reopen our economy in the middle of a pandemic. My Republican opponent, Jason Lewis, is proudly following the President’s marching orders. He has consistently ignored health officials’ expertise, downplayed the seriousness of the virus, spread misinformation, and endangered the lives of our health care professionals, our first responders, our seniors, and countless others. **This is a direct insult to Minnesotans risking their lives on the frontlines of this crisis and to our leaders working to flatten the curve.** We need a thoughtful plan to reopen the country so that we don’t set ourselves back again. We’re not going to get that with Jason Lewis in the Senate — or Donald Trump in the White House for that matter. I’m determined to make sure Trump and Lewis lose in November, but we have a tough task ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to defeat me and flip Minnesota red to hold onto power in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: **If it makes financial sense for you, please make a contribution to help us keep Jason Lewis out of the Senate and make Donald Trump a one-term President. We must elect responsible leaders who will take this pandemic seriously — not endanger our lives and our economy.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17484153/195895298/-1714150354?refcode=tsm-em200513-explain&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjMyNzNlMy03Zjk1LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yqfp8fgQcYFKwbrgTYPRt39hDyKESadZ4h_QSb-k3_Q=)

clean_body: | Hello — In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate. But first, you deserve an explanation of exactly why your donation matters now more than ever. Donald Trump has used irresponsible and inflammatory rhetoric to pressure leaders across the country to prematurely reopen our economy in the middle of a pandemic. My Republican opponent, Jason Lewis, is proudly following the President’s marching orders. He has consistently ignored health officials’ expertise, downplayed the seriousness of the virus, spread misinformation, and endangered the lives of our health care professionals, our first responders, our seniors, and countless others. This is a direct insult to Minnesotans risking their lives on the frontlines of this crisis and to our leaders working to flatten the curve. We need a thoughtful plan to reopen the country so that we don’t set ourselves back again. We’re not going to get that with Jason Lewis in the Senate — or Donald Trump in the White House for that matter. I’m determined to make sure Trump and Lewis lose in November, but we have a tough task ahead of us. Republicans will do whatever it takes to defeat me and flip Minnesota red to hold onto power in Washington, so I’m asking for your help today: If it makes financial sense for you, please make a contribution to help us keep Jason Lewis out of the Senate and make Donald Trump a one-term President. We must elect responsible leaders who will take this pandemic seriously — not endanger our lives and our economy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Only pitch in if you can afford to do so. I understand how difficult and unprecedented this moment is for you and your families. Take care of yourself and your loved ones. Thank you. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: news@durbinforsenate.com
subject: Democrats' path to taking back the Senate just got clearer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
_We hope that you are keeping safe during this pandemic, Peter. We know this is a difficult time for many, so please only contribute if you are able to do so. We are more committed than ever to a Democratic victory in November and are grateful you 're in this fight._

Peter,
We just got some great news about our 2020 fight. NBC News is reporting that "the battle for the Senate seems to have tilted in the Democrats' favor, according to polls and campaign analysts."
The 2020 map is shifting -- and Democrats' path to taking back the Senate just got clearer.
**[Dick Durbin is fighting to hold on to a crucial Democratic seat in Illinois and help support Democrats in high-stakes races across the country. Are you with him in the fight to flip the Senate? Make a $5 contribution now to help meet his $10,000 fundraising goal.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200512i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
This crisis has made it exceedingly clear that we need real leadership -- not only in the White House, but in the Senate. And we aren't getting that from Mitch McConnell and the GOP.
Instead of continuing to respond to the COVID-19 pandemic with increased testing, hazard pay for essential workers, or support for our farmers and small businesses, Mitch McConnell brought the Senate back to D.C. to confirm his former intern to the second highest court in the country.
This is why we need a Democratic Senate, Peter -- and it's within our reach. But removing Mitch McConnell from leadership won't be easy. We need to keep fighting every day.
**[Stand with Dick Durbin in the fight to take back the Senate. Pitch in $5 right now.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200512i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2020?refcode=em200512i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff409f/42ab3cf4/60aa8410/135d21de/1130271287/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff409f/42ab3cf4/60aa8410/135d21df/1130271287/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

While Trumpism is running rampant through the Republican party, Lindsey Graham is losing himself in the process. "" | | | "" Senator Lindsey Graham has become unrecognizable: When Trump insulted his best friend John McCain for being a war hero. LINDSEY SAID NOTHING. When Trump mistreated immigrants at the border and put them in cages. LINDSEY DID NOTHING. When Trump blamed his disastrous coronavirus response on China. LINDSEY DOUBLED-DOWN. Now we NEED to DO SOMETHING -- send Lindsey packing! Jaime Harrison has outraised Lindsey last quarter and is polling only 2 points behind! "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" "" James Carville knows that defeating Trump is not enough, Peter -- we must break down part of the foundation of Trumpism 's power: his powerful crony in the Senate. Lindsey 's hold on Washington MUST end on November 3 if we have any chance to right the wrongs of the Trump administration. body:
I need to shed some light on a shady, shady situation. Dean Browning, also running for this seat for Congress does not have good intentions, his...... Peter, I need to shed some light on a shady, shady situation.
Dean Browning, also running for this seat for Congress does not have good intentions, his record speaks for itself! Take a look!
Dean Browning’s record is TOO liberal and TOO shady for conservative Lehigh Valley!
He: ❌ Was the deciding vote to raise Lehigh County’s taxes by $16, SIXTEEN, million dollars,
❌Supports invasive gun control efforts to open up our medical records to the federal government,
❌Was named in a sexual discrimination lawsuit for creatiting a “hostile workplace environment” for women!
Peter, this doesn’t at all sound like to me what the Lehigh Valley is seeking out in their next representative, and I hope you would agree with me.
If so, would you please consider chipping in NOW to put a stop to liberal, Shady Dean?: [https://secure.winred.com/scheller-for-congress-inc/shady-dean](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=efc4051409fb4860ba995163789008ec&_e=pi3ICXgmNuuFb0a46mBARGTVFujnrthkxz2wTKZnQlabnZmmr0xBfPwMrsG_1WkuLhQ187TaidVx4l6JpFu5FnOjg6GsQ528xXL3Wn76M_5BA0bqWQs-SZIqThHQms5H9T8HRopdbZ7uodE8ujhldFP76UC-xCIqK8FyEZ_OExhcDlDxNA2zU7xd8KAFBRngdNj-u4FYuJ7a-89A3R98nSkImowB4q3QpDbB8C_4ype1trtcb76tjkUTpn5xYVHU485UYWra-arrprliB_7Vo6kLp6__VNT5IyxpdJNedZsaeneKJ0ucKPflFjwZZBWHyfBBCfsnzVrntBLfWrPrpZZfhwms9qTIFsgG4BZcbxJQjAnFuTiJGmibLVhEImgUcmZ2Fl-547YbKu4MLkWqzVC2fWXaY5Fv7WQjHTZQAmgmkib_lxQBl1lbVEsJUK6o_PEtu0Y3EMR9mwcaazfTyg%3D%3D)
The Lehigh Valley needs a STRONG conservative who supports President Trump, wants to protect your constitutional values, and someone who CUTS taxes, NOT raises them.

name: Christy Smith
subject: This was not the outcome we were hoping for, but we are on to November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Hi Peter,

While it's critical that we ensure every vote is counted and recorded, we believe that the current tally shows Mike Garcia is the likely victor in the May 12th special election. As such, I'd like to congratulate him.

That said, this is only one step in this process, and **I look forward to having a vigorous debate about the issues in the upcoming November 2020 election** , from health care access to job creation, aid for working families, investments in local classrooms to wildfire protection, women's rights, and more in the months ahead.

**Most importantly, from the bottom of my heart, I want to express my deepest gratitude to all of our supporters.**

>From our brave firefighters, nurses, grocery workers, truck drivers, and so many on the front lines to our classroom teachers, grassroots activists, women, seniors, young people, and all those who played an integral role in this effort -- I want to extend my deepest gratitude.

This campaign is about you -- and our community -- and there is no doubt in my mind that together, we will prevail in the fall general election.

Thank you,

Christy

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bbb8/29776869/98c47b5/569f288e/2725556425/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTNfY29uY2Vzc2lvbi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200513_concession-full")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Virtual Happy Hour with the Young Democrats 🍻
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Join us for a virtual "happy hour" on May 22nd! |
---
| |
---
|
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together_
> ---
| |
#
I am delighted to invite you to join my campaign and the Young Democrats of Illinois to a virtual happy hour via Zoom on Friday, May 22nd!
---
| [Grab your ticket to Happy Hour for just $5!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=fb9f21ce55&e=140a9b81e7 "Grab your ticket to Happy Hour for just $5!")
---
| Young people are going to play a major role in strengthening our majority in the House, retaking the Senate, and booting Donald Trump out of the White House this November. **Part of the reason I decided to run for Congress was that I looked at the lackluster representation of millennials in Congress, and I knew that I had to do something about it.**_Just 27 of the current members of Congress are Millenials_. We need to give young people a stronger voice in Washington.

We all know that we need more young, progressive Democrats stepping up and running in order to engage with younger voters and increase turnout, and that's exactly what I plan to do. So I hope you'll join me for our virtual happy hour to hear all about it!

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---
| [Get your ticket here!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f0fd2300cf&e=140a9b81e7 "Get your ticket here!")
