We all know that we need more young, progressive Democrats stepping up and running in order to engage with younger voters and increase turnout, and that's exactly what I plan to do. So I hope you'll join me for our virtual happy hour to hear all about it! Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Get your ticket here!" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Dani for Illinois | Our mailing address is: Dani for Illinois PO Box 1671 LaSalle, IL 61301 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: safely supporting small businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This week, many Indiana businesses and organizations are opening their doors to in-person customers for the first time since March. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b8c518ea3665475b8398c1d52357b7f3&_e=sdWNw7r0yKcHKzf8WhMKDQdEf_XaTGVB2xwZplvJXqBDtuk_VhxxoleiZRuman3x54R_L19sqgiYLmu7Qx4r0OIKHjwTeK8gl35EWjlK5gihd-Sre8TaaUTt3faiuFbndDExx6WkUJalHGav4DBZzN3e5mfFrNW65opmCoy9i2rD4924wwomIIeMUPcVz7MHbYhL0BaggHnpBj0-rfmvfZs8aHKRmox-NxTwJhh1wkVczOKQ8y4btXm8begrMISuHwEfjHT3FLDg3kmAiaATi3XsVH-NtuvAG0-ssOKmOLoN1Z1PfrfV5utkbB2DR2VtTPHteNRPIGXbjEpr4EvqHEweCaKVxUsfvJXGdGmJTFvy5HJlOOLAbXRNX4fl_7SmC773RdridyLbLG-yhGQ9nbuNqu2qeK8cKjVoU2A_SRADqZSG0Bfn3jeUgSyRYR-U) Friend, We’re here to spread some good news! _This week, many Indiana businesses and organizations are getting back on track by opening their doors to in-person customers for the first time in weeks. Religious services can be held in person, restaurants and retail stores can open at 50% capacity, and personal services like haircuts can resume by appointment._ _([**You can find more details here**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b8c518ea3665475b8398c1d52357b7f3&_e=sdWNw7r0yKcHKzf8WhMKDQdEf_XaTGVB2xwZplvJXqBDtuk_VhxxoleiZRuman3x54R_L19sqgiYLmu7Qx4r0OIKHjwTeK8gl35EWjlK5gihd-Sre8TaaUTt3faiuFbndDExx6WkUJalHGav4DBZzN3e5mfFrNW65opmCoy9i2rD4924wwomIIeMUPcVz7MHbYhL0BaggHnpBj0-rfmvfZs8aHKRmox-NxTwJhh1wkUg_jWQR61I5nCEKhiCG9cKNRKt-3owQO00aIzPFhLGk2TW8gTCJahQ4y5YMGcqCv38mYKFiXVbGyfhWpbrzWwYaGpTIplAgYh_x6TBP1-BcdvNsLtwTnky3vGtAsgSQlzBDCBY60oU3v1bKcqCtB8j2GmOGLyyzyv-ImNAjv7Xqx2VfINQX8QYkdaMKGVV0RfcmIPSlOV5fe8UZu9_61vM) \-- we’re in phase two of Indiana’s measured, data-driven reopening!)_ Hoosier small business owners and workers need our support, and this news is some welcome relief. But we need to make sure that we are continuing to follow the best practices issued by the state and your local health department — **there’s nothing more important than keeping our loved ones healthy.** If you choose to visit one of these establishments in person, here are some steps you can take to help keep you and your fellow Hoosiers safe: [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b8c518ea3665475b8398c1d52357b7f3&_e=sdWNw7r0yKcHKzf8WhMKDQdEf_XaTGVB2xwZplvJXqBDtuk_VhxxoleiZRuman3x54R_L19sqgiYLmu7Qx4r0OIKHjwTeK8gl35EWjlK5gihd-Sre8TaaUTt3faiuFbndDExx6WkUJalHGav4DBZzN3e5mfFrNW65opmCoy9i2rD4924wwomIIeMUPcVz7MHbYhL0BaggHnpBj0-rfmvfZs8aHKRmox-NxTwJhh1wkUESZpfnrUmWWNGrWp-D_2mg3gcgcBRJSKD-as_5F0clecSeydJa2rO2aOGroITEE0jzMGOg-bGYvwLgoHC5hRQa4tJbUNyxHXPlHWrtItWiE_bu5pfe44NEnLeD7ev-YfzsHeH17CRAZTImhdUvqMrRW4wxuxAqzCkV4DvtMBuGyA1RME0hBY8Fvl44nPZAE4Sr3Qr05NDXnZ1db_8Miyu)
* **Wear a mask** – your mask should cover your mouth and your nose. Here are **_[some tips](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b8c518ea3665475b8398c1d52357b7f3&_e=sdWNw7r0yKcHKzf8WhMKDVDeSALcz2zksKlBFtSAOQri4P4tDkdLL7CjFYQqg-r-hUbi6CNr0VHx94X2tgofLe1wIMcyLCtoeBYLnb5abJUdkgVpw6eO3xDLE0Gd2n_b5IXbeRInQbbrRpk_grXRU_lmV3YDYAkEOKg9r-6OHT5E77hr3AtyTTPMiPajZr26v6L1PRlADq_qYMu7--qLzH0o93cnPtMDxYTbj-D_JFM1GfMkh9zYS0M7oetC09V5I2uxDFCS7aLTOuM2jw-of6_fOM9-pKmCefuHSwU_AE83i63WZH7krezrRSwwPmJFnPaKHqTElGU-Q7Dg_UwPQhbzRD9B9lW9Qh8xom1b9M5KfKZqryS9Vf2fSIDLWtF-rYKLO-kC889XFVd-dMafqDURZx2KTKsrW5W-lipom7JwiYxpI5lLbexzu16wYHTyszQixH2TTRnWKM72xNK6wA%3D%3D)_** on how to wear a mask and how to make one at home.
* **Practice social distancing** – whenever possible, maintain a six-foot distance from those around you.
* **Use hand sanitizer** – bring a bottle of hand sanitizer with you, and use it before and after you touch frequently touched surfaces.
* **Wash your hands frequently** – sign a song to make sure you’re washing for at least 20 seconds. **[Might we suggest “Back Home Again in Indiana?”](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b8c518ea3665475b8398c1d52357b7f3&_e=sdWNw7r0yKcHKzf8WhMKDVGdj3Tz97y2zBVqN16RZP4dCvI9RvePAEz8l50BKgivSBGNbsU48PNrLyfNEpKWD99m-N6okPCPbnJOSSd-hfqgBxBu8CcTbfXGKb_1ibf4ze-vOxATHDBRD_y7O9_OtxzWGSqeTMjQyddMEZiA5-gQsZVzf56UuwNWUO8ODgQbRq-0H8HHh9NqnAnzlvjfF9GWGSheRdkTV5cMK9ca9sWI8vyOaiMTytsK1ilscVCqWJ8VasEMAKgl4fTevreY55WTnNik3OuWeFCcscuR4HJiIVVTyTuFCgoRPpcTJZ0cmLsRYh0Hi8pk7QtoqDZ14EugmkgVafRLN_8yS3K4sRccT2DK-4uZozlhXq0NrL_Hz5rnfR72ZmpGkXhXl3W0NLFkfdETMdJRuiK4zpkXCLeKUv3FkgrtRw4ktOJe-sYuzfJuDlf4S4BjFU4Nx041ETI852SfQSm1Hr6oSP4ujmw%3D)**
* **Visit during off-hours** – it’s easier to social distance when there are fewer people around!
* **Prepay or use contactless payment** – it’s best to limit the things you need to touch and your payment method can help you avoid unnecessary contact.
* **Use curbside pickup or home delivery when possible** – it’s still important to limit your time out and about. Curbside pickup and deliveries are great options to support your favorite businesses safely!
* **Continue hunkering down at home** – if you’re sick, 65 or older, or have a high-risk medical condition, stay safe by staying at home or taking advantage of special hours for at-risk shoppers.
* **Follow the store’s safety procedures** – Hoosier businesses and organizations want to create a safe environment for their patrons. So make sure that you’re playing by the rules to keep everyone safe!
* **Tip generously** — remember, many of our Hoosier service workers have been at home or been working with a limited capacity. If you're able, continue to show your generous support to our fellow working Hoosiers!

Thanks for following all of the above guidelines — we can’t wait to patronize our favorite businesses, but it’s imperative that we keep following these social distancing guidelines. _Following them will help keep Hoosiers safe, our businesses open, and our state thriving. _ #INThisTogether, -Your Holcomb Crew
|

name: Joe Kennedy III Campaign HQ
subject: We can't let these attacks on Joe go unanswered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
we need your help to fight back |
---
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-graphic&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
---
The Markey campaign is spreading misinformation online about Joe. They are responding to Joe's fact-based critique of the Senator's record with false and negative attacks.
[**We need your help to fight back with a positive message and set the record straight, will you chip in $3 or $25 to raise $5,850.00 into our Online Rapid Response Fund before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-SL&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| **[$100](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-EG&express_lane=true&amount=100&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
| **[$250](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-EG&express_lane=true&amount=250&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
| **[Other](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-EG&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---
* * *
Senator Markey's attacks on Joe of "politicizing a crisis" and "playing politics with the coronavirus to try and further his career" are disingenuous, disheartening -- and wrong.
Two months ago today, when a state of emergency was declared in Massachusetts, Joe suspended campaign operations to focus exclusively on this crisis. _Senator Markey did not. _
We turned our email fundraising list into a charity drive, raising nearly $100,000 for those suffering and those fighting on the frontlines. We leveraged our social media channels and website to provide important information about COVID-19 and held daily live streams to keep everyone connected and informed. Our organizing team has been doing phone banks across the state to check in on vulnerable residents and help seniors in need.
Joe drove back and forth to D.C. twice to ensure he represented his district's voice as the House fought to provide coronavirus relief. And Joe showed up virtually and in-person in Chelsea and Brockton to help the communities hit the hardest -- long before the T.V. cameras arrived.
_Senator Markey is running on his record. After 47 years in office, it 's fair to critique votes he has taken and choices he has made that weren't good for Massachusetts, from the Iraq War to NAFTA. If that's all it takes for the Markey team to put out false attacks on Joe -- then we are worried they are going to be even more negative moving forward -- and that is not the kind of campaign Massachusetts wants. _
[**If you can help us respond with a positive message before midnight tonight, please chip in $3 or $25 here to show the Markey campaign that we won 't let these false attacks on Joe go unanswered to Massachusetts voters. **](https://secure.kennedyforma.%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-May2020-FR-markeyrr?refcode=E2746-20200513-markeyrr-SL&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Be well. Stay safe. Let's keep fighting.
\-- Joe Kennedy III Campaign Team
|

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: historic opportunity (need you now)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If we lose in Georgia, Democrats have zero chance at taking back the Senate.
| | |
---
This is urgent, friend.

**My opponent - former Wall Street exec and unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R) - just booked $4 million in TV ads to buy Georgia's Senate seat - and I need your help to fight back.**
As Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate, Loeffler knows that a massive ad blitz attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign is the best way to steal this race and protect the GOP's Senate majority. Because if we lose in Georgia, Democrats have zero chance at taking back the Senate.
**That 's why we need to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours to fight back - but with time running out, we're still falling short. Please - friend - will you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now so we can fight back against every last right-wing attack, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk218-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
While Sen. Loeffler has been cashing in on her public office and now faces insider trading allegations, I'm a pastor who's running a people-powered campaign to take on Republican corruption like hers and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post_ reports that winning this race is key to Democrats taking back the Senate. But Loeffler is using her tremendous wealth - more than $19 million - to buy this seat, and recent polling shows us _neck and neck._
**Here 's the good news: **_Roll Call_ __ just named Loeffler one of the most _vulnerable senators in the entire country_ - and even Georgia's other sitting senator - David Perdue (R) - confessed in a closed-door meeting that "the state of Georgia is in play."
**The GOP is scrambling, and we have a historic opportunity to take advantage of this critical moment and flip Georgia blue - but I can't do it alone. Friend, I need grassroots supporters like you to chip in right now: [_Please, before our midnight deadline, will you give $5 or more to help us hit our rapid-response goal, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate?_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e7a9/288179be/b9bb8a2/348e9ca8/3177324817/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjE4LWZyLW5kLXYyIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk218-fr-nd-v2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with me.

Reverend Warnock

Kelly Loeffler (R) - just booked $4 million in TV ads to buy Georgia's Senate seat - and I need your help to fight back. As Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate, Loeffler knows that a massive ad blitz attacking Democrats and propping up her campaign is the best way to steal this race and protect the GOP's Senate majority. Because if we lose in Georgia, Democrats have zero chance at taking back the Senate. That 's why we need to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours to fight back - but with time running out, we're still falling short. Please - friend - will you rush a contribution of $5 or more right now so we can fight back against every last right-wing attack, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?
